These jeans are super cute and great quality for the price. I did not want to spend $200+ on such a trendy style that I wasn’t sure would work for me but glad I took a chance on these Free People dupes, they did not disappoint. I am 5’9” and 155 lbs, age 47. The 10s fit perfectly, however I am extra thick around the middle and if you are more of an hourglass type the 8s might be a better fit. The 8s were great but a little too tight in the waist for me. I will echo some other reviews that these are definitely high rise, not mid. Totally fine by me but be aware if you care. Lastly, there was a huge difference in length between sizes so maybe consider that when you’re selecting a size. The 10s hit my ankle, the 8s were more like a cropped length.

These jeans are super cute and so comfortable. They fit perfectly - I would say that the size is accurate; I ordered a size 2 (I am 5'5" and weigh 106 lbs). They have just the right amount of stretchiness; they don't feel tight at all. They sit right at the belly bottom, so they are rather high waisted. They fit perfectly around the waist and are loose in the legs. They are cropped, so they look really nice with heels. These jeans are good quality. The stitching is great - I did not see any loose threads or other manufacturing errors. The pants have 2 pockets in back and 3 up front (2 regular sized and one of those tiny pockets no one ever uses). I really like the look of these jeans - very different from the straight, tight jeans I have been wearing. I definitely recommend these jeans - and the price is very reasonable!

These jeans are super cute on. I'm 5'1 115lb. Normally wear a 2 or a 26, but based on reviews and Amazon's recommendation, sized up to 27 which was the right call. Length is perfect with a small platform sneaker, would probably need about 1/2 inch shorter normally - the inseam is 31" and I'm usually a 30. Knee holes hit at the perfect spot. For all these reasons I wanted to give five stars, BUTTTTTT.... My gripe - the butt seam is HORRIBLE. It's fine when I'm standing and looks cute but it is so uncomfortable when I sit. Digs up my butt crack and toward the front, not sure how I am going to fix this, or if sizing up would help, but OMG, sitting in these is the worst.

These jeans are SUPER cute, stylish, stretchy and sooo comfortable! I’m in love with these jeans and how soft they are - they are just as comfortable as some of my yoga pants! The color is good and they are the perfect length on me (I’m 5’4”) however they look nothing like the ones on the model - she is definitely way taller. They are just the right amount of flare and look good with booties! Nice addition to my fall wardrobe!!

These jeans are super cute! They’re also super long. In my image I’m wearing these with almost 3” heeled platform clogs. But I love the look - I think it’s super slimming. I’m 5’5,” 165lbs, waist is 35,” hips are 44” and my thighs are 23” around. I’m also very short-waisted. Per the size guide I ordered the XL. Because these are SUPER stretchy, I’m wondering if I could’ve gone down a size. I can literally pull these on with unzipping them. However, I don’t mind that at all. It’s also difficult to find high waisted jeans that are flattering on me because I’m so short waisted. I really like the rise on these. I’ll see how these do after I wear them for a day, out and about and also after washing. If they don’t stretch out too much or shrink, I’ll stick with this size. If anything changes, I’ll update my review. For now, I’m very happy and I do recommend these jeans. I’m almost 60 yrs old, but I think these would appeal to a broad range of ages.

These jeans are super cute. I am 5'7" and 150lbs. They are definetly a little long on me and perfect for a shoe with heel. The waist is high waisted and fits great. They do have a lot of stretch so would suggest even sizing down. I got my true size but feel with wearing throughout day they will get too loose. Love the style of them.

These jeans are super cute. I am 5'7" and 150lbs. They are definetly a little long on me and perfect for a shoe with heel. The waist is high waisted and fits great. These jeans are super soft and have tons of stretch! However, when ordering I didn't read the size chart, which was an error on my part. I am 5'5" and 180 pounds. I wear a size 12-14 in Maurices Jeans, and so I ordered a 14 in these. I am large in my stomach, thighs, hips and badonkadonk. LARGE. Ordering too small lets these jeans hug all my curves, and it's not flattering in the slightest. Again, MY MISTAKE because I did not consult the size chart. I should have ordered an 18, and I think these would have been a lot more flattering as they would skim over those curvy areas, rather than highlighting all that's wrong with them. I have goals to lose some weight, so I'll be wearing these at home for now, and saving them for public when I reach my goals. If I haven't said it enough, consult the size chart! Take your measurements, match them up with the chart, and then order!

These jeans are super soft and stretchy. They have a (surprisingly comfortable) high rise waist with a multi- button closure. There are useable front and back pockets. These are true wide leg jeans. There is fading along the front thighs and distressing at the leg hems and a patch on the upper jean, which I'm not as crazy about and would prefer it without (-1 star). I'm 5'8" 125lbs and I ordered the size 27 which fit really well. So, I would say these run true to size, or maybe slightly large) Overall, these jeans are really cute, I really like these, and they are super comfortable.

They fit around the waist but were way too long and did not roll up easily at the bottom. However, I probably would have gotten them hemmed except I can't stand the fade on the back side of the jeans. I think it makes them look weird so am returning.

These jeans are super soft, a good stretch to them and very comfortable. I’m 5’4 and they hit crop style right above my ankle. I wear a size 4 and the fit of the Small is perfect. They look super cute on and are a nice thick good quality Jean.

These jeans are super soft, comfortable and flattering! They have a lot of stretch all over, making these jeans ideal for any occasion. They hug my curves, accentuate my butt, prevent love handles, and have a slim fit all throughout. The waist sits right below/at my belly button, which is good because I prefer a mid-rise (super high rise jeans on someone my height/with a short torso isn't great). Because the waist is extra stretchy, I can tuck a shirt in without it feeling tight. I can be bloated as hell and still feel comfortable! The one main negative is the crotch area. When I sit down, the fabric gathers, hardens and points outward in an awkward way (see photo). I absolutely despise the way it looks, but these jeans are so awesome in every other way that I can overlook it. The length is just about perfect on me, which is rare! The shorter inseam is ideal for those 5'-5'3". Because these jeans can expand so much, I can most likely afford to size down. I do have to keep pulling the back up after sitting/lying down. There's plenty of extra room in the waist area so maybe I should've sized down. I usually wear a size 2 Petite in pants and these feel roomier. If you're not sure between two sizes, I would size down, unless you want a roomy waist. Overall, for under $35, these are really nice jeans, and I would get them in other colors/styles. The fabric is lightweight so they're not ideal for wearing in really cold weather. But they work for the hot weather here. They look good, they feel good, and they don't break the bank. What more could you ask for?

These jeans fall between 3 and 4 stars and I don't think I would buy again. The good: The fit is great. I am 5' 7" 135lbs and normally wear either a 4 or 6 in other brands. I have washed and steam-ironed them to soften them up a bit but they are still pretty stiff. Also, on the pair I received, the distressing is uneven. Luckily, I have a deep blue felt pen so I lightly touched up the white lines and now they aren't visible. I am sure I will wear these but they won't be my go-to jeans.

These jeans looked so well in the picture, I assumed they were thin and light, baggy, long (judging by how they looked on the model, who is tall). In reality, the fabric is unpleasant to touch, rough, has some stretch, too thick. The legs are way too short (I am 5’9” and have long legs, but this is 4-5 inches too short compared to pictures. I got size M based on the chart, where the waist was indicated as 28”, in reality it was 26”, because whoever made it did not realize that the distance needs to be form the button to the buttonhole, not form the edge to the edge, which was about 27.5 inches. Fortunately, the pants are high-waisted, and the band was at the high part of the waist, but it is not comfortable, that one inch would make all the difference. The zipper is sewn in in a weird way (see picture), there are loose threads everywhere, some of the seams are uneven, the pockets are badly made etc. I cannot recommend these, won’t even donate them.

These jeans might be the most comfortable jeans in my closet. I'm typically a small, with narrow hips and for me the fit around the waist and hips is perfect. They are stretchy so they will also work for someone with wider hips. The legs are consistently wide from the top of the thighs to the ankles. In my opinion, there are 2 things that could make these jeans really special from a style perspective. One is adding a little more width to the legs and the other is to make them slightly longer. I'm 5'4" and they are the perfect length, but with no room to shrink up. They will be pretty short on anyone 5'5" and over. But, some love that style so it's a preference thing I guess. The added width would give them a more unique look. But, they are great, everyday jeans that I'll wear during the day to run errands or to go hang at a friend's house. When I get home, they are so comfortable I don't feel compelled to rip them off and throw on yoga pants, like some other jeans I have. So, overall, I'm very happy with them, but wouldn't put them in "my favorites" category from a style perspective.

I got the black distressed wash, and I'm obsessed with the edgy, cool look it gives the jeans. The seam detailing down the front of the legs is another nice added detail. I will say the length is a tad long on me, but I think that's intentional so you can pair them with heels or boots. Overall, these wide leg jeans are super flattering, stylish, and comfy. I can already tell I'll be wearing them a ton thanks to that perfectly wide leg silhouette.

These joggers are keepers. I'm 5’7”, 135 lb, curvy on the bottom half with about 28” waist and 38” hips. I struggle to find “high waisted” pants that actually cover my belly button and joggers that don’t end up as high waters. These joggers absolutely hit the mark on those points. I usually wear small, occasionally medium. Ordered these in small, and they fit with plenty of room to spare. I see people saying that the elastic digs into their waists. These joggers are a high-waisted fit. They are supposed to cover your belly button and fit at the narrowest point of your waist. If you try to wear them lower, the elastic will dig into you. So wear them at the point they were intended to be worn. Someone else said these were men’s pants—I would disagree. These are women’s joggers, but there is “slight” pleating on the front, especially if the interior drawstring is drawn tight for a small waist. This produces some bagginess in the front. These pants are a cheap quality version of slacksweats. They fit pretty well, and are comfortable on, but as soon as I put them on, I immediately noticed that the waist is not centered. You can see in my pictures that it’s off to the right, which is even more noticeable when they’re on. It’s a definite no for me because that’s the only thing I can focus on now; just how much off center they look. So for them to look right with the faux zipper centered on the tummy, I’d have to twist them to one side, which throws off the whole fit of the pants due to the other seams and pockets. Looking back at the other reviews, I can see that many of the other colors are cut/sewn the same way, but may not be as noticeable in a darker color. Bottom line, just not worth it when there are so many other better options with more flowy material that’s not this weird rough waffle weave anyway. I prefer a more sophisticated look, but wanted a pull-on comfortable dress slack. This is definitely not it, even if the seams did line up. FYI, I am 5’6, 190lbs, wear a size medium pant, and these were true to size in a medium.

These pants are a fun and comfortable piece for your wardrobe! Granted the material is a bit thinner than I want but they look great on, not see through. I wore them last night and got a lot of compliments. I am 5'9" and all legs and the length was wonderful - I could wear heels and the pants still were long enough. These will be great to pack for vacation to Miami and the Caribbean as they are lightweight and don't take up a lot of room. One issue I had was the pants tend to slip down in the back so didn't feel comfortable wearing a short top (because a crop top would look super cute with these pants).
These pants are a great fit, especially if you’re tall. I am wearing a size medium and I am 5’11” usually wear a size 8/10.

These pants are a great-quality stretchy material that feels good. As you can see in the close-up picture, it’s got a diagonal pattern more similar to jeans rather than the completely smooth knit I’ve seen in other professional yoga pants I own. But it’s still fine enough that the texture isn’t all that noticeable. I like the shape of these pants overall, BUT they tend to sag after just the first few minutes of wearing them, so I have to hike them up a little every so often. (Maybe if I had gotten a smaller size that would be less of an issue, but they aren't loose anywhere, so I was hesitant to size down.) -I’m 5’5”, and the 31” inseam falls below my ankle but doesn’t drag the floor. -It’s fairly high-waisted (comes to half an inch under my belly button). -I’m 142lbs, and the Large is a pretty good fit for me. Definitely would stretch for a few more pounds, and a medium might have actually worked better, but I’m fairly happy with the fit. Overall, a nice pair of work pants!

That said, they are better than 90% of dress pants I have tried, and cheaper than nearly 100%. If they don't fade or wear out, I'll probably buy more colors.

These pants are exactly as expected. Love the Deep Blue color - it is the same in person as in the picture. The jeans are warm and fuzzy on the inside. They are comfortable to wear and are insulating, without being too thick. They are made of 70% cotton, 28.5% polyester, and 1.5% elastane. I appreciate the elastane in them, because it gives some stretch to the garment and makes them easy to move in. Even the first time putting these jeans on, they were easy to move in. These can be machine washed on a gentle cycle and line dried. They can be dry cleaned if needed, but not bleached. Appreciate the easy care of these pants. The front pockets are deep too, which is great. I am 5'6 and typically wear jeans with a 29 to 30" waist and the size M fits well in both length and width! I love that these are high waist and they weren't too tight or too big. The dark blue color of the pants makes them so they can be paired with a wide assortment of tops, jackets, coats, and shoes to create unique outfits. I am excited to wear them this fall and winter.

These pants are exactly what I am looking for, except they are too large. I am 5’3 117 lbs. w 26” h 34.5”. I ordered a size 2 regular. It seems I need a 0 short, but they do not make that size. I would have kept them, but the reason I wanted them is to have work pants for yard work that were not falling off. Returning and continuing my search.

These pants are exactly what I was hoping they would be, but better. The photo you see is after a wash and tumble in the warm dryer (minimal shrinkage). And no wrinkles. I ordered these size S pants - a linen and viscose (rayon) mix, for a 5'3", 110 lb petite young woman with a 24" waist and curvy hips. Although the actual waist, even washed and dried, is a bit larger at appx 26", the pants can be tightened for a smaller waist with the attached belt or another belt. Also, I noticed that there is room to move the button over about 3/4" to make the waistline a bit smaller. For those who have larger waistlines, there is stretch of about 3", maybe a tad more. These are a higher waist pant, meaning, belly button area, and there is adequate fabric in the behind so that it isn't tight or prone to give a wedgie. In fact, the way the pants are cut in the back, and the fabric, makes for a nice drape that resembles the model in the photo. The pants are well-cut and have good stitching, with no loose threads or shoddy workmanship. They are similar to what you might find at one of the large anchor department stores in the mall. The fabric is neither too thin (not see-through) nor too thick (denim). It's perfect for spring and fall, and summer days that aren't over the mid-80s. I would say they are the thickness of a soft chambray shirt, thicker than a man's dress shirt, but not stiff at all. I am so impressed with this fabric composition that I am going to continue to look for garments with this mix: 55% Linen / 45% Viscose. The price point is an excellent value and I would have no hesitation whatsoever about buying again.

These pants are extremely comfortable! The material is soft and flowy. It kind of reminds me of a thin & breathable spandex material but not thin enough that they are see through, they are definitely squat proof and not see through. The V shape on the belly area is flattering and the elastic around the waist keeps them up but isn’t so tight that it’s uncomfortable or restrictive. These do stretch as you wear them so if you’re in-between sizes, I’d suggest sizing down. I washed them on a normal cycle and tumble dried on low, they came out perfectly fine. These are so comfortable that I’ll likely be living in them! You can wear them to work out in or to dress casually. I wore them today with a tank top, cardigan and sandals for school pickup and actually received a few compliments. If you’re looking for stretch & comfort, these are everything!! I ordered a size large and for reference I’m 5’5 & 190 lbs.

These pants are extremely flowy and comfortable!! There’s lots of room and tons of stretch! I’m 5’4 and the length hits me full length without being too long. They’re lightweight but not see through. I don’t think they’re very flattering on me. I’m going to definitely have to play around with styling them to figure out what looks best without looking like I’m wearing pajamas

These pants are fabulous and I love the color! I’m reviewing a size small. I’m 5’2 and I weigh 125 lbs and they fit absolutely perfect! They’re kinda on the thin side. But I can still wear them this winter because I’ll wear fleece tights underneath my pants. Plus, I can still wear them this Spring & Summer. Basically, you could wear them year-round! They are true to size! They are made very well! I’m extremely pleased with these pants! I highly recommend them!

These pants are fabulous for either lounging at home or at work.. The material is 81% polyester and 19% spandex, so there’s plenty of stretch and this material needs no special laundering, comes out of the dryer wrinkle free. What makes these pants look a little dressier to me is that sharp front seam. Very classy looking! The waist clings much like a pair of leggings. I think this is actually designed to be that way to lend shape to your silhouette. I don’t find the waist overly tight or uncomfortable. I like the zippered side pockets for an athleisure flare.The big attraction for me was the choice of a 29 inch inseam because I am petite and have spent my life shortening pants! I ordered a size small with the 29 inch seam and I am 5 feet tall, 117 pounds. These fit perfectly and just drape over the top of my shoe. I will enjoy this alternative style compared to jeans, joggers, or leggings on occasion. Great quality and I highly recommend!

These pants are fabulous! The fabric is a good weight, and drapes very nicely. I need to wear the pants up at the smallest part of my waist in order to make them hit perfectly at the floor. I ordered the ivory as well, and I can’t wait to see if they are see-through. Fingers crossed that they’re not! I’m definitely going to check out more colors.

These pants are fantastic! I was so surprised at how much I love them. They are soft and oh-so comfy! I got the lightweight version and they are exactly that—lightweight, yet not see through. Absolutely perfect for summer! They look so much more expensive than what they cost. Thrilled to add these to my wardrobe. Don’t know about durability yet as this is my first time wearing them, but they seem like they’ll be ok in the wash. My only CON—and not a dealbreaker—is that there’s this funky closure. There’s a normal tab closure with a hook & eye, but then there’s a faux belt with the double rings where you pass the fabric through and tighten it by pulling the end—I hope that makes sense. Anyway, it was only on the front by the tab closure and cheapened the pants significantly so I removed it (of course before I thought to take a pic). Plus, idk how I’d wear a belt on top of it. Idk why the manufacturer would put that there. It’s not shown in any picture either. Again, not a dealbreaker, but wanted to mention it so it’s no surprise like it was for me. Here are my stats...I’m 5’4” and I’m 135 lbs. My weight is pretty evenly distributed, so I’m a natural hourglass. I’ve got a slight mom tummy going, but it’s not awful. My measurements are 39” (or 34DD), 29”, 39”. I ordered the SMALL in lightweight white. I hope you found my review !

These pants are good to lounge around the house. PJ material and comfy. They are a cheap material, but that's ok due to how inexpensive they are. I don't see them lasting long tho, but time will tell. I noticed many said these are super long. I’m not sure if they changed the length on some styles, but the camo pair I got wasn’t very long for my height of 5’5. I'm wearing a size small. I don't see this being a good length on someone taller than my height. At least not this style. However, I do have long legs tho, so that may play a role as well. A little tip for people saying the string comes out when washed. Tie a small knot in the string before washing and it won’t come out. It’s easy to take the knot out after washing. Also, it's probably best to hang dry for longer wear, since it is a cheaper material. I’m middle age (52), and they are good if you get hot flashes, since the material is light. Hope this helps someone.

These pants are great! Lightweight, 100% cotton, well made. And they fit my body type…I am 5’8”, 155 lbs, and bottom heavy. The XL fits perfectly and are so comfortable. These pants are great! After seeming them all over the place from various influencers, I decided to get these and try them out. I had low expectations, expecting them to be that papery, stiff, cheap material… but I was pleasantly surprised. They’re so soft and feel like soft cotton. The colors are also not too bright (my picture makes them look a tad brigjr) and not too dull—-the perfect in between. They can be dressed up or down. It’s a great piece for walking the line of looking pulled together but also super comfortable, could be used as pajamas, but with the right shirt and shoes paired it can be dressed up. I wore them already and got several compliments. I am 5’7” and they were plenty long enough for me, exactly how I want it. They are flowy and not at all sheer. The waist does go up higher on me, closer to my belly button, but it looks just fine if it’s lower too. It’s got plenty of stretch and has a working tied waist. The pockets are also functional (both in the front and the back). That being said, I ordered my normal size medium and they fit great. I’m going to try to wear them as much as I can before summer is over!
These pants are great! Comfortable and durable and reasonably stylish. I wore them hiking and scrambling over boulders and also for gardening and lawn work. For reference, I'm 5'5 150#.

Not a deal breaker for me, but worth noting. I love that the waist fit me perfectly. There's no elastic, no stretch, and I used the measurements in the at size chart. These will prob be too long if you're short. I'm 5'8" and had on 2.5" heels and they were just above the floor maybe an inch. For size reference, I ordered XL and it's perfect. I'm 5'8", 173#, about a size 10. My mid waist is 34 and my hips are 40 inches.

These pants are just as cute as depicted in the description photos. The material is a thin but opaque, lightweight fabric with a little texture that drapes beautifully and doesn't wrinkle easily. They are NOT linen, as some of the lines in the item description suggest. The bow in front is sewn to either side, and is not a drawstring, while the rest of the waist is smocked and very stretchy. As for sizing, I am 5 foot 7, weigh 170 pounds, have a 36C bust with narrow shoulders, a short torso, and a wide but flat derriere, carry most of my weight in the middle, and wear a US women's size 10 or 30 pants (medium size pants and joggers at Old Navy and H&M), or a woman's 10 or 12 in dresses. I ordered these pants in the "large" size, which I think was the right fit for me (see my pics). While I don't think these are the most flattering pants for my apple shaped flabby stomach, they are super comfortable to wear with no pinching at the waist, and I can see myself wearing them often as soon as the weather warms up. Overall, these are cute, comfortable summer pants, and I'm happy with the quality. I would order from this brand again.

I really like these pants and may get them in another color.

These pants are lightweight and flowy just as described. I am 5’9” and have to hike them pretty high. They run long even on me, I can see that being the only downside to these pants. If you know how to hem then I would recommend them.
These pants are lightweight but flattering and super comfy! I can wear them for work or play. I ordered 27" and am 5'4" but sent them back for 29" which are PERFECT!!

These pants are literally perfect. I’m about to order a third pair. The tie waist is great and adds just enough style. They can be worn with heels or flat sandals or even sneakers. They’re extremely comfortable and breathable and regulate according to your body temperature! I’m almost 5’7” and am 135 lbs and the small fit perfectly. Stretchy waist is very comfortable. The whole sewing pattern of the pants is great. They’re very slimming which I think is my favorite thing about them. Love these pants!!

These pants are lovely, well-made, and lightweight. The perfect alternative for my yoga practice when typical yoga pants just feel too warm in the summer for me. The problem is they are pictured drooping down to the top of a shoe. I like that look, and what I was looking for, but these do not do that. The elastic goes just above the ankle and the pants don’t really go any further. I will probably keep them, though as they are comfortable, the elastic is not too tight and the material is very nice. They are not as puffy as typical harem/Thai pants. They have a much slimmer look which is nice. I am on the shorter side of average height, 5‘5“ and not so heavy that the length is taken up by that issue.

These pants are made of a lightweight silky feeling material. They are very comfortable on, but because they are lightweight, they show every lump and bump.They are high-waisted, up to my belly button and long enough for my 5'9" frame. I like these for working out or travel, definitely for casual wear.

These pants are made of a nice thick denim fabric. No stretch to the fabric except in the waist. Good quality fabric and well made. They do run a little long. I’m 5’9” and they are about an inch longer than I’d like but everything else makes up for that.

These pants are made of a nice, fairly thin and lightweight fabric, that makes them perfect for hot summer days. Despite being thin, they are not see through. The fit is excellent if you follow the size chart and the overall look is very nice. Nothing weird sticking out or not falling as it should. So perfect construction. As mentioned by other reviewers though, these are a bit long to be called capri. At 5'5, they are just slightly above my ankles, so they're cropped pants, I would say. Other than that, no complains. Very flattering.

These pants are made of a very nice material. I wear a large typically, so I ordered a large and they fit great. There is elastic in the back for a little extra movement and the length is good for me (I'm 5'8"). I will be wearing these cute pants often!

These pants are made of a very nice material. I wear a large typically, so I ordered a large and they fit great. There is elastic in the back for a little extra movement and the length is good for me (I'm 5'8"). I will be wearing these cute pants often!

These pants are made well, the fabric is very stretchy but thick enough to provide enough structure so they don't look like yoga pants. The high waist is the most comfortable that I've ever worn. These pants look good with my flats and my heels so they're very versatile ! I washed in cool water on the normal cycle and tumble-dried and they didn't shrink, pill or wrinkle. No iron needed. So they're very easy care. I ordered medium and I'm 5'6" 155 lbs and they fit great. They accommodate my bigger legs and the waist could be smaller but the pleats make them very flattering. One thing I noticed when wearing is the front creases when you sit, even for a few minutes, as you can see in the last picture. But it's a small price to pay for such comfortable pants. I'd definitely order again and recommend them!

These pants are more police blue than navy. My shoes and vest are navy and you can tell the difference in pics. Very comfortable and stylish. Love the back pockets. These run long. I’m 5’3” and need to hem 1.5”-2”.

These pants are my new favorite! They fit exactly as expected and are so soft and comfortable. I'm 5'7" and 140lbs and for a size M/6 which is my normal. I expected the pants to be a little longer (y2k) style, but they were not too short either. I need these in more colors! I want to wear them everyday!

These pants are my new favorite! They fit exactly as expected and are so soft and comfortable. I'm 5'7" and 140lbs and for a size M/6 which is my normal. I expected the pants to be a little longer (y2k) style, but they were not too short either. I need these in more colors! I want to wear them everyday!
These pants are nice and flowy- I ordered a size up but could have ordered my usual XL. I’m 5’10” and 195, ordered a 2X but could have gone with the XL. The length is perfect!

These pants are nice, perfect for work. The material is a bit thin and it does show the underwear line easy, though. A bit staticky but but too bad. I'm a short person at 5' 4", but the inseam is doable if I wear high heels. If I don't, the bottom touches the floor. The waistline has stretchable back so it's somewhat adjustable. The pockets are large and totally fits phone fine.

These pants are not for anyone under 5' 8". I am 5'2" and I had a good 6 inches to spare in the legs and the rise was so long that I could pull these up to make a strapless jumpsuit. However, if you are way taller than me, the fabric and stitching were excellent quality and the color was a nice apricot pink.

These pants are not what I expected, because the fabric is shiny. However, I think they’ll be fine for walks on chilly days. The pants are well made and I like the soft fleece lining. I am 5’8” and 132lbs. and the size Medium, 32” inseam is a little large, but I think they’ll work.

These pants are okay. The white is definitely very sheer, even with light colored under, I would still lean towards purchasing one of the darker colors as the pants are thin. The waistband is also thin and cheap feeling. True to size - I got a large. I’m 5’8, 170 and usually buy a long in pants when available, and these are long enough for me! Returning because I found a different pair of flowy vacation pants I like better.

These pants are perfect for a warm day. They pair well casually or business casual. This color is not see through as there is a lining from waist to knee. For reference, I purchased a large in Light Apricot. The color appears more light beige than apricot. I'm 5 foot 1 and 160 pounds. To get the length at my ankle I have the waistband below my belly button. If I wear them on my waist they are a cropped length.
These pants are perfect for casual wear or work wear! Straight leg, mid rise and regular fit! The length (long) is perfect for me. True to size (6) for reference I am 143 lb and 5’7”

These pants are perfect for comfort and class. I bought a large tall in black. I am 5'8" with long legs. 165 lbs. The stretch makes them comfortable and the pant style make them dressy for the office or a funeral...which is why i bought them. Thick enough fabric so no show of bodysuit seams. Well made. Will be buying another pair for airport travel.

These pants are perfect for comfort and class. I bought a large tall in black. I am 5'8" with long legs. 165 lbs. These pants are perfect for spring/summer weather. The fabric is lightweight and flowy it is not the softest linen but just reasonably soft. The style and fitting is good and gives a smart look. I do not find the belt really purposeful it seems unnecessary the waist has elastic for some extra stretch. It is a hight waist pant and the length is suitable for my height 5’4”. The fabric is not see through and does not get many wrinkles. I look forward to wearing these in the summer months because they will be comfortable to wear.

These pants are perfect for the office. They don’t show any lint or other material which is very nice. They fit perfectly and as expected. I got a size 4, I am 5’ 7” and 160lbs. It is a little short on me but I have very long legs so I’m used to it. These pants actually went longer than some of my other dress pants which was very nice! Will definitely buy more

These pants are perfect for work or every day activities. Thick material that slips right on. Flattering but I have to order 12 and I am 5’4” 170 lbs so these hung just a bit long on me. For most people these are true to size and will fit appropriately. I am short :) Great pants for the price! Anti-wrinkle tooooo!!

These pants are perfect for work, perfect for a day out, I love them and whenever I wear them I get compliments. I am 5’2 and these pants don’t drag. They feel good, they don’t restrict the belly, they are comfortable and the material is nice not cheap.

These pants are perfect high waisted dress pants for both work and going out! The fabric is not what I expected, but turns out the fabric is super comfy and made me feel like I was wearing sweatpants rather than dress pants. The waist and bottoms of the pant legs have ties to adjust to your body, although I bought these too big. I am 5’3” 140 lbs, I would suggest getting a medium. Over all I love how high waisted these are and I am super excited to wear them out!

These pants are perfect material! The color is wonderful, great quality and comfortable. I feel confident and ready to conquer the day in these. Definitely recommend. I ordered them.in black as well. I'm 5'9" and 180 lbs.

These pants are perfect, lots of stretch and form fitting. Not see through, I got black and worth the money. No belt loop tho but you won’t need it. I got a L, 5’6 190 bottom heavy. I could’ve sized down and I’m sure it would’ve fit more snug.

These pants are perfect! I have the green and red/orange pair and will definitely purchase more. I like them so much that I am leaving a review and that says a lot! I ordered a medium and large both sizes seem to accommodate my weight fluctuating. I am 5’2 170lb and curvy. I didn’t hem the pants since I wanted them super long. If you are looking for a wide leg pant these are the ones!
These pants are perfect. Feel great, not to heavy or to tight, I’m normally a 2 but did a 4 just incase. I really like them and think they are perfect for work. I’m 5’2 and 120-125pounds

These pants are perfect. They hide my problem areas and feel great. I am 5’7 and they are too high. Will be ordering again.
These pants are perfection, so comfy, fit is amazing. I’m 5’5” and 155 pounds and purchased a Medium. Like them so much I might buy another color.

I’m 5’5 and they do hit above the ankle as advertised but that is that awkward length where these pants would probably only look good with flip flops and look strange/cut off with tennis shoes etc.

These pants are quite adorable. They are very Boho chic. I love the wide leg design with the tassels at the waist and the fact that they actually come with pockets that are decently deep. The material almost reminds me perhaps of high-quality bedsheets or maybe a really good handkerchief if that makes any sense. They are soft and very comfortable, but are very far from being short person friendly. I am 4 foot 11 and these drag the ground for at least 2 inches.. the model in the photo makes it seem that it comes right to their ankle so they would have to be quite tall for that to be true. I had hoped they would just come to the very top of my feet, or at least lay on the top of my feet, but they definitely drag on the ground past that. I will be forced to wear quite tall shoes with these, unless I can find a way to get them hemmed. Other than the issue with the link, these are quite incredible.

These pants are really comfortable . Problem for me is I’m 5’6” 160 lbs. I have a 10. These pants are really comfortable and easy to wear, my wife likes the style and fit of them. She likes how comfortable they are while still looking polished. There are no buttons, zippers or belt loops, so make sure to get your correct size. For reference she is is 5’4 and about 120lbs and got an extra small and likes how they fit, the length is perfect and the waist is snug but not uncomfortable. The material is good quality, she likes the thickness of them and thinks they will be fine as winter wear with boots and a turtleneck and can be worn with sandals and a tank top in warmer months. Overall she is really happy with them. She likes the style and fit. They are very versatile and classic bottoms that she expects to wear a lot. Her only issue is they don’t have pockets, just one small one in the back that isn’t really functional. I hope that sharing my opinion and experience here provides you some value when shopping and deciding on something like these pants, if so please let everyone know below.

These pants are really nice, especially for the price. There really classy looking and quite comfortable (fabric is 100% polyester). I would say they are true to size. Overall I think these are totally worth it.

These pants are so beautiful (in photo and in person) and I was so excited to get them. I realize I am very thin and I am not as curvy as the model in the picture, but I am also not emaciated. I ordered the smallest size available, a small, and was thinking they may be a little loose…possibly. I am swimming in them and I’d have to gain 15-20 pounds to fill them out. They are also super long as you can see I’m barefoot in some of the pictures, and I actually wore 5 1/2 inch platform heels in another to show how they look. Which was fine in the heels. But I cannot believe how large these are for a small. I would have to guess these are about a size 28 in US sizing or a size 7/8. To me, these are a generous medium (maybe even large) and I wonder if size tags got mixed up. I’m 5f4 and weigh 106. I am thin, so I typically wear a size 0 jeans. However, I was not expecting these to be this big. Again, maybe a little loose, but wow! I am very disappointed because these jeans are beautiful. I can tell that they would look great if they made an extra (double extra) small.

But that being said, I love the color, the material is flowy and thick, so it doesn’t show my undies. Super easy to dress up or down and pair with some cute heals. I am 5’4” and with some 2.5-3 inch heels, they are the perfect length. I’m flat-footed in my photos, so use your imagination that I am wearing heels!

These pants are so comfortable and very good looking. Plus, they don’t wrinkle. I wore them to my yoga class and received many compliments. Several of my yoga friends will now be ordering a pair or two. Fit is true to size. (I’m 5’ 7”, 130 lbs., and I ordered a medium). Would recommend these to friends and family.

These pants are so comfortable, I've just purchased two more pairs in different colors. I LOVE wearing these! I'm 5' 7", about 125-130 lbs, with a 29.5" natural (high) waist. I have the size M in the Mustard color. I likely could have gotten away with a size S, but I wanted that little bit of extra length. I have a flat behind so these are extremely roomy on me, but they feel so comfortable and freeing... they're like those harem pants that were all the rage in the 80s, but these are more tailored. The corduroy seems to be a slightly finer wale than is pictured? But it looks great, and is so COZY. I tried them on to photograph them, and then couldn't bring myself to take them off to switch for jeans. I wore them for the rest of the day. Walked the dogs in them, and though they're lightweight, I stayed warm. These are perfect for Hobbit Girl Autumn, and I am here for it. :) The pants look nice rolled up, or not. They have an *almost* barrel shape that is so in fashion right now, but they don't make you look like Popeye. More of a Lagenlook style. They're super cute with booties. I have a 2" wide belt, and it works perfectly with them.

These pants are so comfortable, they are on the thinner side so they’re better for the warm weather. You can dress them up or down. I’m 5’3 about weigh 180 pounds I’m wearing heels in the photo so they’re a good length for me. I want them in every color!

These pants are so comfortable, you'll have to double to check to make sure you're not wearing pajamas! They are not thin, so they fall nicely, all while stretching just enough for comfortable all day wear. I ordered them in black, and through multiple wash and dry cycles, the color has not faded to the eye. When first removing from the package there was a button indent on the opposite side of the buttons but it came out during washing. The stitching is nice and consistent, and the pants came out of the dryer (after having been left there for several hours) with no wrinkles, which make these great for traveling! The pockets, while not large enough for a cell phone, are really more for show so you avoid a bulge from an item in the pocket. The fit is true to size, and I am 5'9” and they were long enough for me to wear with a pair of shoes with a 2” heel with no problem. I advise ordering these in multiple colors.

These pants are so comfortable! I am 5’6” and usually a size 8-10 and ordered an XLarge to give me plenty of room. I could have definitely sized down l to a large, but the drawstring works, so they are perfect. I love the dark blue, I want other colors now!

These pants are so comfortable! I am 5'8" and 16o lbs. I bought size Medium and they fit really well. They are long enough that they touch the ground in flats and look nice with a short heel. The elastic in the back help the comfort while at work sitting at a desk and walking around. They are lightweight so I will love them when the weather gets warmer, too. The rust red was so cute I bought the light gray blue.

These pants are so comfortable! I an 5'5 145lbs. I wear a size M/L so I went for the large here for the loose look. They can be dressed up or down. I wore them to a restaurant for dinner and I also wore the to christmas at the inlaws where we were all dressed comfortably. They are a little long but I was okay with that.
These pants are so comfortable! I got an XL based on reviews but could have worn the L. I'm 5'8" 200 ish lbs. I was worried they may be a bit short but the length is perfect!

these pants are so comfortable! I ordered a small because before pregnancy i was 125-128lb & 5’4”. they fit perfectly and even fit over my belly/back support band which you can see in the first picture! I am 25weeks 3days today and weigh about 133.2 and i feel there is definitely still enough stretch to get me through these last 14weeks! Will definitely order these again!

These pants are so comfortable! They fit perfectly over my baby bump, and when I no longer need maternity clothes I can still just fold down the top band and wear them! They have pockets! I’m 5’7 and the length is perfect on me. Only downside is after wearing a few times I’ve noticed pilling in the fabric already in areas where the fabric rubs together more as you can kind of see in the photo. But seriously the most comfortable pants I now own.

These pants are so comfortable. I got a size up because I've gained some weight, but that was utterly unnecessary. I'm 5'7" and these pants in Large are about 6" too long for me. I'm ordering medium to see how it fits differently, because if I can find the right proportions I'm hoping they will work. I love the fabric and style!

These pants are so comfortable. I wear them to the office with a dressy shirt and pumps but they could just as easily be dressed down. The fabric is a little more casual than I would like since I got them for work but I’m keeping them because they’re so comfortable. I’m 5’5 and got the 31” inseam, which is the right height. I didn’t need to hem them.

These pants are so comfy and cute. These will be my new favorite pants to wear into the office. I'm 5'3" and 110 lbs and size small fits perfectly. These are a bit shorter than I was expecting though. Not really long enough for me to roll up like they are in the photos.

These pants are so comfy and cute. These will be my new favorite pants to wear into the office. I'm 5'3" and 110 lbs and size small fits perfectly. These are a bit shorter than I was expecting though. Not really long enough for me to roll up like they are in the photos.

These pants are SO comfy and perfect to lounge at home! I love the fit and color of them! I have them in the xs in the 30” inseam and they are a little long on me but nothing too crazy! I’m 5’1” for reference!

These pants are SO comfy and SO worth it. For reference i am 6ft 1in and i got the medium 37 in inseam and as you can see they go all the way to the floor and are very high waisted for those of you who like high waisted. Perfect for going out and also perfect for work. BUY THEM!!

These pants are so comfy! Totally my go-to lounge at home pants when I still want to look *kinda* cute but also be comfy and casual. I bought these here about a year ago and literally wear them all the time. I love wearing these out in the garden or doing light yoga. The frog button is super cute, and the minty color is just as shown. I wear these high waisted just above my belly button, and they end above my ankles. I’m 5’3”, 125lbs, 26 waist, and the smallest size fits me perfect, the elastic is nice and really stretchy but stays put. AND they have pockets! If you wear this with the right cropped or tight top it can be a super cute spring summer casual outfit out. Idk why some other people gave such bad reviews, this product is exactly as shown and honestly look better on than I even expected! The material is definitely quality 👌🏼 They’re durable but still lightweight. They’re nice in temps up to 80 but not for extreme hot weather.

These pants are so cute an I’m in love with the shade of pink. They are lightweight and are really soft (material is 65% Polyester, 35% Cotton). They have an elastic waistband that kinda makes me wish I would have sized up because it feels a little tight when I sit (I’m 5’9” and around 150 lbs and ordered a medium), but not so much as I wouldn’t want to wear these. I could definitely wear these lounging around the house or running errands in fall or winter. The reason I didn’t rate these five stars is because I think they are slightly higher priced than I think they should be, by maybe $5-10. Otherwise these are great sweatpants.

These pants are so cute and flattering. Not to mention comfortable. Upon taking them out of the packaging I thought they were going to be to small, however the stretch is wonderful. I purchase a size 2x. I normally wear a street size 20/22 & I'm 5'2. They were just a little long, but I wasn't tripping over or steeping on the bottom of them..

These pants are so cute and trendy. I got lots of compliments! I am 5ft2 and bought a small; they aren’t long like on the model. They fit well but I removed a star because they are a little scratchy on the inside. Otherwise I love them!

These pants are so cute and very comfortable! They aren’t scratchy on the inside which is nice. The length is good and actually go to my feet which is hard to find being 5’7. I do wish i was able to get an XL because it is at its max around my hips and thighs which worry me a little for after going to the bathroom and possibly ripping them. Also fair warning it does leave a black residue on your hands when touching the material, I’m not sure how to get rid of that. Theyre so cute though and i love the shorts in them for extra coverage

user_comment: These pants are so cute on. They have a highwaisted, wide legged design w/ a pleat above each leg. They have a button closure & half of the waistband is elastic to help w the perfect fit. I’m typically an 8/10 or medium in pants, but after checking out the measurements on the size chart I decided to order a size 6 & they fit perfectly. So with that being said, I think these run a little big, but as long as you choose your size based on the seize chart measurements you should be good. The length of these run long, but they’re perfect w heels which is how I prefer to wear them anyway. Not to mention, im on the short side at 5’2, so these are tall girl friendly. The material is on the thinner side,, so unfortunately these may not be the best to wear during the winter, but I plan on getting tons of use out of them before it gets too cold. The material also doesn’t have any stretch, but these are still comfortable due to the baggier fit. I love the classic pin stripe design, but the thin white stripes don’t stand out as much as some other pinstriped designs. Regardless they still have a great look & a white top will easily help to make the pinstripes more noticeable. These seem to be pretty well made too, as I have not come across any flaws. Overall these are great pants that are both cute & comfortable & I definitely recommend them.

These pants are so cute! Light weight but feel high quality. Flowy and comfortable, but very thin (think underwear lines). These would work for so many occasions (weddings, showers, reunions) or just an every day work pant. I wanted to share pictures in the multiple colors because I couldn’t find photo reviews of some of these. I ordered medium, I’m 5’6”, 155. Hope this is for someone!

These pants are so cute! Pretty good quality too! The only thing is that they are so short. I’m 5’7 and these are definitely ankle swingers… Will wear again though as the sequins got stuck together very minimally compared to other sequin pants I’ve worn before.

These pants are so cute! They’re a thin material but not cheaply made. There is no stretch and the waist and hips are a snug fit but I think they’re true to size. I wasn’t sure on sizing with the mixed reviews but I’m a size 10/12, 5’10, 180lbs, bigger in the bum and hips, and the large fits great. Wore them today for the first time and got lots of compliments!
These pants are so cute. I got lots of compliments every time I’ve worn them. They are thin but not see through. I’m 5’7” 155lbs and I ordered a medium and they fit perfectly.
These pants are so flattering and comfortable. True to size and very stretchy. I’m 5’2, 130lbs, and ordered a small. They are a little long tho, just something to consider.

These pants are so flattering, comfortable, and versatile. You can really dress them up or down. I am shorter and usually need pants shortened, but I think because these are already meant to be ankle length, it’s actually perfect pant length for petites! I am 5’2” 121 lbs, got a small. I’m thinking of getting another pair.
These pants are so friggin cute! They are thin but extra stretchy and super flattering. For reference I ordered a size small and I’m 5’5, 160 lbs.

These pants are so fun and on trend. They could be dressed up or down I’m tall 5’11 approximately 175. I usually wear a 12/14 and first purchased an extra large, which was baggy in the legs- returned for a large. Additionally ordered the hot pink and silver. I’m returning the silver because they’re a bit more lavender than desired. The hot pink is scrumptious. These pants are a bit short for us tall gals but I can style with ankle strap shoes or boots. Nice fabric and good value.

These pants are so lightweight and soft and perfect for a warm day! They're SUPER wide, which gives them a very flowy appearance. The pockets are deep and hold my Pixel 8 Pro without any issues, and the drawstring keeps the pats at my waist. The pattern is bright and beautiful, and other than some wrinkles that will come out after washing (which I don't actually care about) these are ready to go. For sizing: I'm 5'3" tall and they just brush the ground when I walk when pulled up to my actual waist. I'm currently around a size 18/20 and I feel like there's still a lot of stretch left in the waist band. The pants themselves do not have much stretch, but there's still quite a lot of space.

These pants are SO nice. I am really surprised. They have a nice weight. They are not paper thin but also not super thick. Great for hot summer. They are buttery soft. I am 5'7 155lbs I ordered a medium and they are a perfect length for me. They hit right above my foot. I can easily wear sandals with them, and they dont ride up really short when I sit down (I have long legs). They have pockets. The thicker waist band gives good tummy support. They fit really comfortably around the waist. I would buy several other colors. I recommend these!

These pants are so nice. They are in style which is awesome, but also comfortable! They do have pockets (yay!) and fit true to size. I feel so fashionable in these and ready to go get business done in them. I’m 5’4 and they’re the perfect length and size in a small. I recommend them.

These pants are so perfect for all year round. I liked the fit, the fabric and the color. It is of great quality and seems like a durable garment. I ordered a small size and it fits just right. For reference, I’m 5’4”, around 145lbs, 37” hips, 31” waist. Also, the length of the pants is great for my height. This is that type of pants that you can easily dress up or down. I love wearing it with white sneakers or any type of sandals. They are so comfy and flattering. I highly recommend it.

These pants are so perfect for all year round. I liked the fit, the fabric and the color. It is of great quality and seems like a durable garment. I ordered a small size and it fits just right. These pants are so pretty - a flow, silky feeling fabric with a pretty leaf pattern. They have an elasticized waist band, and even an inner lining of "shorts" made of a very thin fabric to avoid any "see through" issues in the panty area. My only problem is the length. I am 5'21/2" and weigh 160, which is why I needed the size L, and these drag the ground! I will have to take up the bottom hem in order to wear them comfortably. These will be great for summer wear as they are cool and breezy feeling, so I have time to do that little chore. Overall, I am pleased with these pants.

These pants are so pretty and flattering on. They feel soft and light and look adorable! Apparently I accidentally ordered a L when I meant to order an XL, but I actually thought the fit was perfect at that size. They feel a touch shorter than I'd like, resting firmly above, not at the ankle. The size up wouldn't add much in length though, so not sure if I'll bother exchanging them. 5'9" and 195lbs
These pants are so soft and comfortable and have a nice fit! I’m 5”10 - 158lbs and got size Large which fits perfectly! It’s high waisted and has no pockets. I love it!

These pants are so soft on the outside, I keep finding myself running my hands over them. For reference I'm over 50 years old. Height 5'6", weight 170lbs measurements Bust: 43 Waist: 34 Hips: 43. I chose the XLarge in Navy Blue These pants remind me of the old velour track suits. As you can see in the picture, the ribbed nature of the fabric really isn't seen unless you're up close. And the blue is a deep color that unless the light is shining on them, they just read as dark. The fabric is fairly lightweight and does drape nicely. There is a fair bit of stretch to them, but I'm glad I went with the Xlarge just for the comfort of being baggy. The inside of the fabric is not as soft, but it is smooth and isn't aggravating to my sensitive skin. The stitching all seems fine, primarily just constructed on a serger. The elastic waistband is good, with a channel in the middle for a draw string. The pockets are nice and deep, I can even put my kindle Fire 7 in them. I would recommend washing inside out as they do pick up everything. My cat rubbed against my leg and it was covered. I'm not sure that I would wear them out as they really seem a bit too casual to me and given that they pick up lint easily, I'd have to carry a sticky roller with me. Washing inside out they didn't shrink, bleed color or change texture. Any wrinkles just give them a crushed velvet look and seem like it's meant to be that way. For that reason I can see traveling with them. Overall, they are very comfortable and soft and I can see myself chilling in the house wearing these often. Peace and comfy pants

These pants are so stinking cute and fit amazing. I am 5’5”-138lbs…I bought a small. I took these out of the package, did a quick throw in the dryer and wore them that day to a work event. It was a little hot, and the material is linen and light weight, so they were very comfortable.. They are high waisted, so I bought a white crop t-shirt from amazon and called it a day!! I am ordering another pair now!! I promise you will love them!

These pants are so super stretchy and comfortable to wear. I ordered a size 8 was excited to find a longer inseam. At 5'7" and 160 pounds the 33" inseam and it was actually too long. I will be returning for a shorter pair. Overall I really liked these pants.

These pants are so super stretchy and comfortable to wear. I ordered a size 8 was excited to find a longer inseam. At 5'7" and 160 pounds the 33" inseam and it was actually too long. I will be returning for a shorter pair. Overall I really liked these pants.

These pants are so trendy and you can dress them up or down based on where you’re wanting to wear them. There are a lightweight fabric, but they’re not see-through. I am 5 foot four and I weigh 150 pounds. I am wearing a size medium, and these were very comfortable and did not give me a muffin top. I did not feel like they were too long and the slits on the side to make it to where I had no issues walking in them in sandals today.

These pants are so wonderful! They are very soft and stretchy. I would personally order a size down. I have a 52-55in hip area and 43-40 waist (I like my pants on the tighter side to do some tummy control higher measurements are without anything) and the size 22 is very loose on me. The thighs, calfs and ankles are also pretty loose. I feel like a size 18 or 20 would have fit how I prefer. BUT! I highly recommend these jeans. They are so comfortable and they are pretty high waisted!

These pants are soft, very comfy and have just the right amount of stretch to them. They look well made. I love the tan color. I ordered a large which fits everywhere. The length is good, a tiny bit longer would have been ok, too. I'm 5'4" and the L comes just past my ankles. The waist line is ok, a little more room will be nice if I can lose a few inches. That is truly not the pants sizing issue though, it's definitely my issue. I'm truly glad they even fit me, knowing my current waistline. Very nice pants!

These pants are soft, very comfy and have just the right amount of stretch to them. They look well made. I love the tan color. I ordered a large which fits everywhere. That is truly not the pants sizing issue though, it's definitely my issue. I'm truly glad they even fit me, knowing my current waistline. Very nice pants!

These pants are some how too big yet a bit snug at the waist. I appreciate that the expansion is on the side instead of the large band at the front. But that doesn't give much room or comfort at the front because the elastic is at the sides. Pre-pregnancy, I wore a US 6 to 8 in pants so I ordered the medium. They are quite big around the hip and leg area to the point that it looks like I'm wearing the wrong sized pants. The length also is a problem. I'm 5'4" and while I understand they're supposed to be a cropped fit, they just look like high water pants on me. They aren't flattering on me at all. They are, however, pretty well made pants. The denim is thick and sturdy. There are no front pockets because the elastic is where the pockets would be. They do have back pockets so that's good.
These pants are sooo amazing!! I’m 5’ 5” and 220lbs. These fit so good and will look so cute with a distressed tee for a Vegas raiders game!!

These pants are stylish and versatile. The fabric is lightweight, flowy, and cool. I love the paper bag style waistband and deep pockets. I’m 5’4, 130 lbs, and usually wear size small. I ordered size small and they fit great, with the slight caveat that the elastic waistband is a little bit tight. I have a short inseam and usually have to wear short or petite inseams. These pants are regular length. They are a little bit long on me, but with flats or sandals, the long length (on my legs) looks intentional. I’ve noticed other reviewers stating that the beige version of these pants are sheer, but I don’t find that to be true of the black pants. Overall, these are a nice pair of summer pants that I’m sure will get a lot of use.

These pants are such a cute vibrant pink color! The material is a satin like polyester blend. I'm only 5 feet tall and these fit just right in terms of length, they hit right at my ankles. I ordered the x-small and they fit perfectly. I really like the pockets. My only minor complaint is that these are pull on pants and I always prefer to have a zipper on my pants.

These pants are such a cute vibrant pink color! The material is a satin like polyester blend. I'm only 5 feet tall and these fit just right in terms of length, they hit right at my ankles. I ordered the x-small and they fit perfectly. I really like the pockets. My only minor complaint is that these are pull on pants and I always prefer to have a zipper on my pants.

These pants are super adorable, and very nice quality. I absolutely LOVE the pink color. However, here are the issues I have with these pants: 1. The waistband is soooo tight. I stretched them out on the back of a chair for two days hoping it would make the elastic give a little. I even steamed it while stretched but neither gave me much, if any relief. 2. I am tall, 5'9" and pants are always short on me. I can make these long enough by pulling them down from my waist (which then makes the elastic even tighter when lowered to my hip) but I have a lot of sagging in the crotch. I will still wear these but will have to wear them with a long silk shirt that will cover up the crotch area. 3. Last things to know are that you should NOT wear any lotion of any kind when wearing these pants. I mistakenly had some on when I wanted to wear these and this fabric really shows moisture so I couldn't wear them and had to send them to the wash. Which, MAKE SURE YOU WASH THEM SEPARATELY. The pink dye in these pants bled onto other items in my wash. Nothing was important so I didn't care but everyone should know and take heed of this warning. Anyway, super cute pants. I may just take the elastic out completely (if that is possible) and make it a drawstring waist because I DO want to wear these.

When I bought a second pair of these the string was not inserted at all. I had to fight with chopsticks and evade my cat in order to assemble my pants.

These pants are super comfortable and they look pretty nice. In the photos Im wearing them straight out of the package but I washed them and they wash good. FIT: Im usually M so I got a size M and I kinda regretted it. I went with the size chart but considering they stretch a lot on the waist, I should've ordered S, for reference I weight 130lb. Also, Im 5.3, and the inseam is a bit too long for me, even with chunky sneakers. I will have to alter the hem or just wear them with high heels. Overall very nice and comfortable.

These pants are super comfortable, have 5 full pockets, belt loops, and come in fun colors! I typically wear a 12 size pant and ordered these in a L. They are a perfect skinny fit but and have a little give in the lower leg-ankle area so as to not look like a legging. Love these and will definitely order more. I’m 5’5” and 165 lbs for reference.

These pants are super comfortable. I'm not allowed to wear leggings to work and no one even noticed they are a little big and I fear if I lose weight they'll be too big but for now they're great. I'm 5'8", 165 - 170lbs, I ordered the large.
These pants are super comfortable. The fabric is soft and not too warm. They fit perfectly. I am 5'3 and the Medium has the perfect length. The front pockets are super cute. It is a dark burgundy.

These pants are super comfortable. You could wear them as pj's! They feel like a t-shirt material, but I am totally going to pair them with a nice summery blouse and wear them to dinner!! I am 5'6" and the length is perfect for flats or sandals.

These pants are super comfortable. You could wear them as pj's! They feel like a t-shirt material, but I am totally going to pair them with a nice summery blouse and wear them to dinner!! I am 5'6" and the length is perfect for flats or sandals.
These pants are super comfy & look great on. I bought them in both black & blue, and I love them. For reference, I’m 5’5” & 140 lbs wearing a 6R and they fit perfect.

These pants are super comfy and lightweight. For reference, I’m 5’3” 146lbs and usually wear around 10/12 in pants. I went with the 12 and they are pretty loose so I’ll prob go with the 10 instead. But overall definitely recommend!

These pants are super comfy, can be dressed up or down, wash/dry easily and don’t wrinkle easily when wearing. I’m 5’4” 145 athletic build. I ordered a small and they skim the ground in flat flip flops. Since they are so forgiving in the XS may have been a better length but they are not getting stepped on/tore up so it’s fine. A thicker waist band would be nice. I have received many compliments and others wanting the link.

These pants are super comfy. They've become one of my favorite pants now. They are a bit too long for me even with a good 4 inch heel added on. I'm 5'5" and I still had to cut off a bit from the bottom. If your a tall girl you most likely wont have to worry about the length. But if your short like me then still get it but cut the bottom to desired length.

These pants are super cute and amazing. I have gotten many "high" waisted jeans before and they never hug tight to my actual waist its usually right at the belly button. I am 180 pounds 5'3 and I got the dark denim size 15, but with that being said I looked at all the reviews of people who got the dark denim too and matched my size to what they were saying. If you plan on getting black look at the black pants reviews. Look at the reviews of what matches what you are getting. These pants are amazing and I have already fallen in love with them! My butt has never looked better! Good luck yall!😌
These pants are super cute and comfortable, unfortunately they are also shorter than advertised. That makes them extremely too short for me. I'm 5'9" and ordered the large.
These pants are super cute and confy, runs a bit small. The only issue is tgey are shorter on me , I'm 5'9",they hit me at my ankles exactly.
These pants are super cute and extremely comfortable! I love them so much that I'm buying more! I am 120-125 pounds and 5ft 3. I wear a size 4 jeans- about 27 inches. I bought small!

These pants are super cute and fit to a “T” so they’re true to size for sure! I’m 200lbs and I wear a large however, in the photo it shows the pants with more of a ridged pant leg bottom and when I received them the hanging tassle things were SUPER LONG and nothing like the photo.. so I just cut them down and now the pants are perfect.

These pants are super cute and flattering. They are a heavier weight material, so definitely look and feel more like a jegging or really stretchy jean instead of leggings which is what I wanted. They are very skinny and a true ankle length which is hard for me to find at 5' 4". I am around 135ish pounds and curvy and the 6 short fits perfectly (I'd say they run comparable to AE jeans/junior clothing in sizing but maybe a size bigger than some women's sized jeans). They do have pockets on the rear but they do not look like "mom jeans". Also, the elastic waist band is thick and it seems to hold in the tummy area nicely. Definitely recommend!

These pants are super cute and the fabric is very nice. Also squat proof, I hit a full leg day in these! My only complaint is I wish they were just an inch maybe two longer. I’m 5’9 and like my flare pants to just barely touch the floor.

These pants are super cute and versatile. The material is unique—almost like a ribbed, satin pajama fabric but thick enough to hide any lines or bumps, and thin enough to drape nicely. They can be dressed up or worn casually as "fancy sweatpants." I got them in black and I'm curious about the other colors, as the material might look different in lighter shades. The tie at the ankle gives them a stylish parachute pant look, but they can also be worn as wide-leg pants. At 5'8", they hit right at/slightly below my ankle. If you're shorter, they might be too long for the ankle-tie style. I usually wear a large, and the large fits perfectly.

These pants are super cute as pictured but they just do not hang right on my daughter's 5'2" frame. We always anticipate hemming pants and maybe that will allow the wide leg to hang correctly. For reference, she is wearing an xsmall. The quality seems on point and she describes them as "very comfortable."

These pants are super cute pants and true to size (I'm a size 4 and ordered a small). The color pictured here is the black. They have an elastic waist with ties which is for those that usually need tightening at the waist. I like that they have pockets on each side that are pretty deep. The legs are super wide (bigger than bell bottoms) and flowy and the perfect long length (I'm 5'6" and the bottoms land right above the floor). I would suggest wearing these with a tighter top to offset the width of the pants, unless you are going for super casual look. The material is a bit thin (not see throughy) so these are better suited for warmer environment. The only down side I had so far was these are a bit static, I guess because they are polyester, so I need to find a way to keep them from sticking to my body as I walked (see picture three around the top). I could definitely see myself wearing these pants in white or a fun pattern at a beachy place. Would be perfect for that!

These pants are super cute, but they are a bit uncomfortable and itchy to wear. They have a layer of white fabric that is meant to be a barrier between the sequence and your skin, but the fabric is very thin and porous, and unfortunately the sequence just pokes through making the pants very itchy while you wear them. Other than that, they are well made, and very pretty. They are stretchy and they fit as expected. I am 5'1 so they are a little long on me, but that is expected. Overall, these are very nice pants but they are not the most comfortable to wear. They are itchy and thin, but they are stretchy and pretty.

These pants are super cute, soft, comfy, and good quality. However, I will be returning because they are very high watered on me, and when I sit, the end of the pant leg sits at mid calf on me. For reference, I’m 5’ 9” and ordered a size 4. I’m bummed they’re not long enough!

These pants are super cute!! One of my only complaints is that the zipper doesn’t stay up throughout the day. I was able to fix this by just using a string attached to the button of the pants, but it would be much more convenient if the zipper would stay up on its own. I’m 5’1 and 120lbs, so these were a bit long and just a bit too big around the waist. Nonetheless, they’re super cute and any minor issues can be fixed quickly and easily!

These pants are super cute. I'm 5'2" and 145 pounds and ordered a size M. They fit me well and were comfortable. There is elastic on the back that tightens them around the waist to make them look more flattering. The length was just right for me to wear a short heel. I am not sure that they would work for someone that is tall. Unfortunately, I only wore them for one day because after a long night of dancing, I sat on a concrete fence and caused a lot of irreparable snagging on the fabric. I should have known better but my feet were hurting.

These pants are super flattering. They have a great quality material, it’s a dressier feel. The waistband is very stretchy, and they run pretty true to size. I’m 5’6 1/2 tall and I normally wear a size 12/14 in pants, or a L/XL. I ordered these in an XL and they fit perfectly, the waistband has stretch in it that can fit someone a little bigger as well, and there’s plenty of room in the hip area. I did try the size larger which also fit but there was too much material and it didn’t look as flattering so i’m keeping the xl.
These pants are super light and comfy and the hem is actually long enough for me, which is rare! If you’re under 5’8” you will probably need to hem or wear with heeled shoes

These pants are super long on me but it was to be expected as I am only 5ft tall. I trimmed about 2 inches off and with shoes on it's a perfect length! It's high waisted and the pockets are deep. The jean is medium weight so it's not super thick but doesn't feel super cheap either. It has some stretch so it's super comfortable so far. I bought it in a medium and my waist is 28-29.

These pants are super silky, soft, and stretchy. They're very comfortable to wear but aren't flattering on me at all. I'm usually an XL-XXL, US size 16-20, and went by the size chart and ordered the 3XL for my 40" waist and 49" hips. But I think my usual size might have looked better. I love the pockets! But these are thinner though and the fit just isn't right for me at all. They're okay but I wouldn't personally pick them again.
These pants are super soft and comfortable, but they are very Long. I'm 5 ft 8 and you can see how far past my foot they go.
These pants are super stretchy and comfortable. They are cute and flattering. I’ve bought them in three different colors now. I’m 5’5” and 120 lbs. I got a small.

These pants are super stretchy and perfect for people with thicker thighs and a small waist (always my issue when buying pants). For reference I am 5’4” athletic build and I got the extra small. (I ended up returning because I liked but didn’t love them, and I can’t justify a purchase I don’t absolutely adore, so that’s the only reason for the four stars.)

These pants are terrific. The color is not bright white (which is what I was hoping for) but the white is "whiter" than cream. The waistband is wide and comfortable. I am 5'6" with a short torso and I ordered a medium. I'm usually a 4/6. The length is perfect for me and I really like the elegant balloony bottoms. The fabric is medium-weight and totally fine modesty-wise. There is no fabric content tag, but I suspect the pants are more cotton than linen. There is a linen-like texture to the fabric, but the feel of the fabric leans towards cotton. As other reviewers have noted, the pockets are low, but I like their low placement. When you order, pay attention to the style names - some pants are available in different styles so be sure to look at the larger photos to make sure you're ordering the correct silhouette. I see these pants getting a lot of summertime wear in my future - I wish they came in olive green!
