These pants are the “pull-on formal” type with no fly/ button, a thick elastic waist and detailing like overstitched pockets and belt hooks to make them work-appropriate. The fabric is of pretty decent thickness but if I kept them I’d probably need shapewear to cover the vpl and lumps and bumps. I ordered them in long, as the current fashion for flood pants doesn’t suit me, and they would be just about right with a modest heel (I’m 5’6” and somewhat short waisted). I have a small waist and big booty, but I was hoping they would work for me due to the stretch and elastic waist but they gaped really badly at the back. If I went down a size they would probably fit better at the waist but I wouldn’t want them to be any tighter on the hips for work pants. I returned them because of this but think the quality and style are good.

These pants are the best ones I've ever bought! They fit well, were long enough for me at 5'8. I normally wear a 24/26 depending on the pants. The 24 fit perfectly with a little bit of room and stretch.
These pants are the cutest! I had to buy another pair in a different color. They’re comfortable and the corduroy is nice and stiff, which I like. I’m 5’9” and 118lbs. I got a small and it fit well.

These pants are the perfect length (I'm 5'4) and really great quality! The material is thick, soft & flowy all in one. Highly recommend, will definitely be purchasing another color. For reference I'm 123 lbs and the XS fits well 🤍

These pants are the perfect shade of green and fit fabulously well. I have washed them several times, and they so look as good as new. I cannot believe the quality for the price and would highly recommend them. I am 5'3", weigh 100 pounds, and usually wear a 27 inch inseam. The length of the regular inseam fits me perfectly.

These pants are the perfit fit to wear with some sneakers and a hoodie. Fall weather needs to hurry and come now! So comfortable and a nice relaxed fit. Wearing size medium for context. I am 5'8 and 178lbs.

These pants are too adorable! They are very comfortable with just enough stretch. I’m 5’6”, weigh 140lbs and I ordered a medium. They fit perfect. It was worth the weight to get them. The delivery took a couple of weeks. So if you’re wanting them for an event, don’t wait yo order!

These pants are trendy and comfortable. I ordered a medium even though the size chart said I should have ordered a small. I’m glad I ordered a size up because they are comfortable and I think they still look good. I’m 5’7”, 135 lbs. The leopard print denim is cute and can be dressed up or down. They are fairly well made but a little pricey for this price point.

These pants are true to size & comfortable. The fabric has good thickness. I'm 5' and 135lbs, Medium is good but it's a tad too long for me. The waist is pretty stretchy and perfect width so it doesn't roll. Pretty good pants
These pants are very comfortable and extremely flattering. I am 5’ 6” and weigh 195. I ordered the 14 and I love them. I could probably have ordered the 12 but I like the 14s for non spanx days!
These pants are very comfortable and feel sturdy! I would say they are more relaxed in the legs than in the picture (more of a boyfriend style). I’m 5’10” and 150 lbs and the 10 long fit great!

These pants are very comfortable and look super cute! I am 5’4 and 125lb and it fits true to size! but I am not very tall and the length of this pants are a perfect for me! but if you are taller this pants might be short for you!

These pants are very comfortable and look super cute! I am 5’4 and 125lb and it fits true to size! but I am not very tall and the length of this pants are a perfect for me! but if you are taller this pants might be short for you!

These pants are very comfortable and soft. Fit perfectly I got a small and I am 5ft 110 lbs. the only thing I find weird is the 2 front knee pockets don’t have any kind of closure. I bought 2 pair and would buy more. I wash them and no shrinkage at all. As with other reviewers the zipper can be a nightmare to get up and down. I hope it doesn’t break cause I really like these pants.

These pants are very comfortable and some of them are cute. I bought two pairs in the same size. The black and white leaf pattern and the blue and white poke-a-dot ones. The black and white fit well, they're a little loose but I don't mind. The blue ones were way too big. Which is odd when they're supposed to be the same. I'm keeping the black and white and returning the other. I'm 5'4" and with a tiny heel they do not touch the ground. With flat shoes they drag a bit.

These pants are very comfortable I like the deep color of the jeans and are made well. Because of the stretch in the material I suggest going down a size. Being 5’3 I knew the length would fit like a regular jean and not above the ankle but that’s what I wanted. They are not a skinny jean. They are a regular fit with a flared leg. Even if I went down I size which I should have. The cut would still not be a skinny jean.

These pants are very comfortable maybe a little too big, but I love them. I’m 5’8 and 156 lbs and got a size large. I could easily probably fit a medium as I have an invisible belt helping keep it snugger.

These pants are very comfortable to wear, and the fabric feels soft against my skin. I found it convenient that I could remove the wrinkles from packaging by simply putting them in the dryer for a few minutes, and they looked great afterward. The wide legs and drawstring waist give these pants a casual feel, but they can also be dressed up with a nice blouse. The elastic waist is very forgiving, so if you're in between sizes, the waistline has some give. I also appreciate that they have pockets, which is always a plus for me as they provide a place for my hands. As for the size, I ordered my usual medium size, but these pants feel and look a bit too big for me. There's too much material around my hips and backside, which isn't very flattering. If I order again, I'll definitely go down a size. (For size reference, I'm 5'6" and 124 lbs.) Other than the sizing issue, I really like these pants, and the fabric has a linen-like appearance. These pants are very comfortable. I am just under 5'5", and about 125 currently. Bought a medium. They are a little big, but still okay. I wash them, but do not put in the dryer - just hang up immediately. They come out almost wrinkle-free this way. The material is a little flimsy / lightweight, so i don't anticipate wearing except in the summer. I added a few stitches with a sewing machine, because the elastic in the waistband kept rolling. Now the elastic can't "flip" inside the material. Sometimes i roll the waist-band down one time to create a shorter "rise", since these are truly a long rise.
These pants are very comfortable. I am 5'8" and was afraid they would not be long enough, but they are. I did go up one size. I get lots of compliments when I wear these.

These pants are very comfortable. The material is dressy looking. The elastic waist is very comfortable and the length is perfect for me. I am 5'7". The blue and white pattern is very cheerful and beachy. The pants are flowy and lightweight and cool. The quality is good and the price is fair.

These pants are very comfortable. The material is dressy looking. The elastic waist is very comfortable and the length is perfect for me. I am 5'7". The blue and white pattern is very cheerful and beachy. The pants are flowy and lightweight and cool. The quality is good and the price is fair.

These pants are very comfortable. They have pockets In the front. The fabric is light weight and perfect for summer errands, yoga or casual wear events. I have a medium. Women’s 6/8 in clothes. I’m around 5’4. The length is fine for me but for someone shorter you it maybe a little long. It also washes very well and the color does not fade. I typically let the pants airdry.
These pants are very comfy I even bent over and stretched my legs. I’m gonna use for work. I’m 5’0 and weigh 126 pounds. I got size 2 short.

These pants are very flattering, with a pleated front, imitation back pockets, and a nice drape. The fabric is a slinky, dressy material that has enough weight to drape smoothly and not bulge stiffly at the hips. I love that they have the impression of back pockets, which creates a nice silhouette; you can see from my images that they're a sewn 'fake' that doesn't actually have any function beyond looks. The waist is elastic in the back, with a zipper and tab closure in front. The size large fits as expected at the waist, and is about 29" inseam. The pink color is a nice cool tone. Overall, I'm really impressed with these pants and so pleased I decided to order them for spring!

These pants are very flattering. Even more than the bootcut pants, especially for those with muscular calves. Material is medium weight. Style is versatile. They can be to be worn in office or lounge around in the house. Quality is also very good. I’m 5’7” and ordered 31 inseam.

These pants are very high waisted, have decent pockets for female pants with a frayed, wide flare leg. The denim has a touch of elastic to it so they hug well without needing to do gymnastics to get them on. I was impressed that not only were they long enough but at 5’10”, touched the floor barefooted, something most pants never do. The zipper is metal and well sewn in, the rivets are all well pressed but the button is just a snap on which means it’s loose on the fabric and will not last overly long. They wash well without shrinking, keeping their vivid white and black pattern but the frayed bottom did fray a lot more. May need either a stitch line or some fray stop to keep them from falling apart long term.

These pants are very light and comfortable, perfect for the hot, miserable weather we have been having lately. Be aware that they come with a waistband that could stand the Leaning Tower of Piza back up. This waistband is NO JOKE. It is about 2 inches wide and not sewn into the pants so when you wash the pants, it twists all around with little hope of ever being orderly again. I cut the damn thing out and thus now have even more comfortable pants minus the muffin top that any two inch waistband is bound to cook up. For reference, I am 5’6”, 145lbs (more athletic build than squishy). The pants also have a lot of extra room in the crotch, which is hard to explain because they are women’s but all the same, they are cute, comfortable, affordable and I’d recommend them (with a band-ectomy). Hope that helps :)

These pants are very light weight and comfy. I was a little thrown by the texture at first. The material does wrinkle easily. They are much longer than they appear on the model. I got a size small and am 5’2”, 125lbs—these pants touched the floor when I wore them. Still ended up looking cute, but not what was presented in the listing.

These pants are very long. I’m 5’7 and they bunch up a lot at the bottom even with heels. But they are comfortable. I should have order a size smaller but I do like them. 8/10 just because they are long

These pants are very nice for curvy girls. I have a 31" waist and 41" hips. The cut combined with the stretch is very flattering in the size 10P for me. I think that because these are cut for this specific body shape and with the stretch in the fabric, I could have sized down (normally I size up for my hips). There is a bit of excess fabric at the hips but with a bit of ironing they relax and look great with plenty of room to move. Even though they're a bit big, I love the way that they drape, looking wide and relaxed with a gently graduating boot cut. The finish is nicely tailored and professional. The length is great and measures 29" at the inseam: flats or heels appropriate for me at 5'2". I would still recommend to size down if you're in between. With them being sold as a gabardine trouser, I was expecting them to be a bit more of a classic suiting material. It still has a nice weave to the fabric so I'm pleased with the finish. In all, these Rafaella pants are good quality and excellent value and my bum feels great in them!

These pants are very pretty and of a nice quality material, however I will be returning them. 1. I didn’t find that they were becoming on me. They made my hips look wide. 2. They fit well, except for the elastic waistband, which was too tight, not relaxed, & not comfortable. I chose the black & coral to wear at the beach. They need to be comfortable. If I had chosen a solid color and they were becoming on me, I could see keeping them. For reference, I’m 5’2”, 108 lbs., size 4/small The length was perfect for me. I considered exchanging the size small for a medium, but thought that they would be too big everywhere else & too long, which would require hemming. Before sending them back, I tried them on again. They are high waisted, so I pulled them down a little bit on my actual waist. They seemed more relaxed looking on me, and the elastic stretched some. It was more comfortable, but I still didn’t think they looked go on me. Pulling them down some of course made them a little longer.

These pants are very soft and comfortable but, as others have said, just a bit thinner than expected. However, for the price, I have no complaints. They come just to the bottom of my feet and I’m 5’4”, so if you’re tall they might be a bit too short for you, and if you’re short you may need to hem or fold them. Love the fabric - it feels silky, lightweight, fantastic for steamy S Fl! It is somewhat perforated and that’s why I like it. I have similar fabric shorts from Lululemon and those shorts are my FAVORITE item from that brand because of that airy/breezy perforated fabric. Full Five stars for that. Hate how wide and long these pants are on my 5’3, 26 waist, 106lbs, 33 hips frame. The waist is very spot on, but the rest of the pants is just too overwhelming. If the seller makes the same style pants (pleated, dress up or down type) but half of the fabric in the width, shorter length (25-26 for petites) and more of the mid waist than high waist, I would most certainly and happily buy that. But for now, I don’t see myself wearing it, just too enormous for me. If you are taller with similar measurements and enjoy the wide leg style - go for it, the fabric is great.

These pants fit fairly nicely. I wear a US 8 in jeans, and the waist is not snug (I received a M). I’m not a huge fan of the elastic band at the waist, but it isn’t too tight. The inseam is long enough for me. I’m 5’4”, but have longer legs. The crotch area leaves a little to be desired. I don’t have a butt, but if I did these pants would be riding up in places that I don’t want them riding up. The material is flowy, comfortable, and not see through, but I don’t feel that these would be as cool as lighter weight materials in the high heat of the middle of summer. They are a cotton/linen blend (70/30) so maybe they might be okay in the high heat? I just don’t know that answer for sure. I feel that since they are slightly thicker than what I was expecting, that they would be great from very early spring through mid fall - depending on the climate where you live. They are thick enough for me to wear in temperatures in the 60°F (15°C). They are well made. I love that they have pockets, and the color is perfect. It’s like a mix of denim and teal. Overall, I would recommend, but if you have wider hips, a butt, or thicker thighs, there might be an issue in the crotch area. Check other reviews and find people who are similar in body type to see how it works for them.

These pants have a very strange fit. For context, I'm 5 feet tall and weigh 122 pounds, and I ordered a small. First, the pants have an extremely high waist; I have to pull them up to my chest for the crotch to fit properly. Additionally, the pants are really long, so they might work better for those with longer legs. The most unusual aspect of these pants is that because the material is thin, they are lined with a pair of shorts. These inner shorts are bulky, making it look like you're wearing a diaper or something underneath. It's a very odd look. However, I do like that the pants are soft. Be aware that they shrink.

These pants have become an unexpected staple in my wardrobe. They are incredibly comfortable, have very deep pockets, are surprisingly wrinkle resistant, and can be reworn multiple times without laundering (much like jeans). I’m 5’7” with a 31-32” waist (apple shape) and wear and 8-10 in pants. I have several pair of these pants in both small and medium. I’d recommend going with the smaller if you’re in between sizes. The attached pics are my size M; the S are less baggy on my bum. I travel a lot and these are my default pants for long flights. They are a bit bulky to pack when not being worn, but are so versatile that I find they are worth the space. They are a med-thick cotton (not linen) and are comfortable in a wide range of temperatures. They are easy care. I wash them in the machine with cool water on the regular cycle and dry them on low heat. Packing wrinkles fall out easily using the “spritz and smooth” method (spritz with plain water and smooth with hands while laid flat on the bed).

These pants have such a vivid color. The green is very solid green. I feel it’s almost not true to the photos in the description but pretty close. They are stretchier than I thought they’d be and fit well. I am 5’ 5” and about 186 lbs. I hover between a 12-14 depending on the brand and the day. I went with a 14, and they’re spot on. I definitely would not have gotten away with a 12. Sometimes 14s tend to be long on me, but these are perfect bootcut length for my proportions. The rise is like a high mid. I would buy these in more colors and likely will, soon.

Overall, a really nice and well made pair of pants. I could easily wear these to the office or more casually with sneakers. But follow the size chart provided for the best fit.

These pants looked super cute on the model. I like the fabric, it is very interesting. Don’t know how to describe it, but it looks nice and feels nice on the skin. The fabric tag says it is Viscose-46%, Polyamide-51%, and Elastane- 3% . The elastic waist makes them easy to slip on and off. They have roomy side pockets. They are well sewn, with straight and true seams. I bought size large, because large seems to fit me best most of the time. But these pants were 3-4 inches too long. I’m 5’2”. If you have a matronly figure these pants are not the best choice. Doesn’t matter if you tuck your shirt/blouse in or wear it out over the waist, all the gathering and bow around the waist makes you look thicker than you already are. For someone young, slim and tall these pants would look very stylish. They may require a little ironing.

These pants were comfortable the minute I put them on. They don’t wrinkle or shrink in the wash or dryer, and I’m pretty tall (5’10”) and these sit perfectly by my ankles. These pants were great! Stayed on well with good thick lining. I am 5’5” and all leg and these pants are very long. Just something to keep in mind.

These pants were just what I needed for a business casual event! I’m 5’4” and 130#s and the 6 fit perfect. Note that it is not stretchy material, rise comes above hips but below belly button, and the jeans ended past the ankles but didn’t drag on the floor. Very pleased!

These pants were not for me. I got a XL. I’m 5’4” 190 lbs. I’m apple shaped, normally wear a size 16 or XL for comfort & these were not even close to being flattering or even decent looking. I usually don’t need a petite in length but these were super long for a regular length & were just tight overall. The waistband reminds me of what they used to call “old lady pants”. Yuck.

These pants were okay. They seemed fine quality for the price. The leather looks nice and isn’t plasticy. The button and zipper seem like they’ll break after a few wears. Definitely not high quality but I didn’t expect that. I bought size small and medium and both fit me. They do have some stretch and the small (4-6) fit nicely so I would say true to size (I’m a size 27/4 regular in most jeans). The medium (6-8) also fit well just a bit wider on the thighs and the waist was fine because it’s stretchy. However 2 things were very disappointing 1. they run very short in my opinion. I am 5’7 (the model is 5’5) and typically wear regular length and these hit a few inches above my ankles so no where close to the length on the model in the photo. 2. They are not as straight leg as the model either (both small and medium hugged from thigh just above knees, and they flare a at the bottom which I did not like at all especially with how short they were. I would not recommend If you’re looking for that 90s straight leg style as advertised and are taller than 5’4 or have any curves.

These pants were perfect for an all white event we were attending. I ordered these in a hurry and they arrived within a day. I was super skeptical based on the sizing so I ordered a large short, and a XL short (for reference I’m 5” and 160 lbs.) I was not sure on sizing as I’m curvier and some reviews were mixed based on my weight. The large ended up fitting perfect, they hugged my hips and waist so nice without suffocating when I sat down. Just a heads up I went with the thin as that was the only white in stock in my size, they were a bit sheer but nothing a nude pair of underwear couldn’t fix. They did come pretty wrinkled which I expected, I steamed them and they stayed wrinkle free the entire night. 10/10 highly recommend for a summer fit!
These pants were perfect! I weigh 151 lbs height 5’2” ordered a size medium! The tie at the ankle really set these pants off!!!! Love themmm!!!

These pants were perfect! They didnt come with the drawstring like the pictures show but it’s elastic enough that I didn’t need it. still something to note. The material is thick like a light denim but breathable!

These pants were pretty good quality and for being a coated/shiny material they were very comfortable, not sticky or squeaky. I got the 8 Long and I wished they'd been just a couple inches longer. These run big in my opinion. I’m in between an 8/10 in jeans, it really just depends on the brand and material. Most of the reviews said to size down and I’m glad I did. I ordered a size 6 and honestly could’ve gone down one more size. They are also a bit short. In my case it works because I can wear these with boots and it’s the perfect length. If I were to wear these without boots I would look like I’m waiting for a flood since I’m 5’8”. They do have a good amount of stretch and look as pictured. The back pockets are small as some others also note. My phone fits but most of it is not in the pocket lol. They are comfortable and the color is as pictured as well.

These run pretty true to size - maybe ever-so-slightly small. I ordered my usual size medium, and they fit tightly but comfortable. I did not put them in the dryer, just in case, I didn't want any shrinkage. The label also says to hang dry, but they are cotton 88% and polyester 12%, so I don't see why you couldn't dry these. Speaking of the material, I am disappointed that they have any polyester since the listing claims 100% cotton. My skin has an aversion to polyester, so I try to keep it out of my wardrobe. These feel decently soft on my skin, so I am hoping they will be ok, but I am taking off 1 star due to the claim of 100% cotton, since that is not what the label says. Other than the material, these are just like the like the listing photos. They are baggy but a flattering cut. I am 5'3" and these come below my ankles, but they are not too long. I'm excited to put together some artsy outfits with these!

These runs tru to size. Per amazon recommendation i was between sizes 5 and 7. I bought 5 first but i felt uncomfortable. Too tight. The size 7 fit like a glove. These satin pants are thick…quality made and they fit true to size. But I will still wear these when an occasion arises. For reference, my measurements are 41-35-46. I recommend these for more slender thigh body types, especially for a sleek and leaner look.

These seem like very high quality for the price, are very stretchy, cute and comfortable. They're soft on the inside and nice and long -- I'm almost 6 feet tall and these fit perfectly. These aren't super warm so just be careful. You could run in them in like 35 or 40 degree weather probably, but they wouldn't be warm enough to walk in temps like that. But that's not why I bought them and not what they're intended for. Buy the fleece lined leggings if you want something very warm for going outside in the cold. (Or just buy them because they're super comfy and cute too!)I really like this brand and own a lot of clothing of theirs now (like 15 pairs of leggings, 4 tops, some shorts etc). I wanted these to be a little loose honestly so I went up a size. All of my other pants are Larges but I bought an XL and like it. I think a Large would have fit fine but would have been tighter.I don't get anything for writing this review btw, I'm a real person with a real job who likes writing reviews to try and be and counter the trend of fake reviews. I paid full price for these because I wanted them. Let me know if you have any questions!

These seem very solidly made. They are thick enough to wear with a long shirt but not so thick that they look bulky. I wouldn’t wear them without something long-ish to cover the butt because you can see thong lines through them. They’re perfect for me because the waist is high and thin so no lines will show through a tight top. It’s not going to hold your stomach in, but that’s not why I bought them. I’m 5’4 and 125 lbs and I bought the one size.

These seem well suitable for 1st and 2nd trimester for most people, I think. They are a little firmer elastic than I expected so I think it will depend on the person since some people gain more inches on their waist during a pregnancy than others. As far as I can tell, I think these will comfortably come out as far as 13 inches past your pre-pregnancy waist, and maybe a few inches more, depending on your tolerance towards tighter elastic feeling. However I think these are really great for apple-shaped people or who suffer from extreme bloating. They hit right on the natural waist and with a longer top that covers the elastic, they look just like fashionable jeans. Actually these are probably the most flattering jeans I've ever worn, they make my legs look soooo skinny. I usually buy jeans in size 10 - and these in size Small are like a size 6 on the legs part and like from size 8 out to like a good 22 or so for the waist. The unstretched waist is 30 inches, the rise is 9.5", the inseam is actually 27" (and I am 5'3" so this is perfect for me). Unstretched hip is 36", they stretch out fine to my 38" hips. My waist size fluctuates a lot and then it's not unusual for me to bloat out as much as 10 inches by dinner so these are so great for me. I'll see how they hold up to more washings but I'm probably going to try out more from this brand. These silky high waisted palazzo pants are a timeless classic. The fabric is a silky feeling synthetic material that drapes well, and they are very flattering. When taken straight out of the box, they were a little wrinkled but that is to be expected. With a few minutes in the dryer they flattened right out. The waistband falls at the smallest part of my waist -these are very high waisted, and plenty long in the crotch. The pockets are not too shallow, and can fit my phone without slipping out. The waist band is both elastic and drawstring, so they are comfortable, functional and adjustable. I wish they were longer though- I am 5 foot 6 and with completely flat sandals they were about two inches from the floor (and I prefer a floor length pant). I think if you are shorter than me, the pants would hit the floor or perhaps allow a higher heel if you're close to five feet tall. If you're taller than me (for example 5 foot 8 or more) then they would be more of an awesome Culottes length. I ordered a size Medium, which based on the chart fits a size 8 to 10. I am a size 10 and these fit nicely in the waist (meaning the elastic was a perfect comfortable fit and did not require additional cinching with the drawstring). Overall these are a breezy daytime pant, the type that you see on European women with strappy sandals, a form fitting body suit and a great pair of sunglasses.

These straight leg jeans by Levi's are high-quality and flattering. Great fit, and comfortable too. I am 5'7", size 8-10, 152 lb (37"/31"/40"), and ordered these jeans in a size 8 per the size chart. The size 8 fits me perfectly so, if you are between sizes, you may want to size a little bit down. These jeans are definitely high rise and come up all the way to my belly button. They fit me exactly perfectly all the way down: not too tight anywhere, but not baggy and loose either. The fit around the butt area isn't the most flattering, but it does me OK. The length is also perfect on me, perhaps on the long side. I also appreciate that the fabric is substantial and the pockets are real. The front pockets are not very deep, though the back pockets are sufficiently large. The fabric is quite substantial compared to other jeans, but still soft enough not to be irritating. Overall a really nice pair of jeans from Levi's if you're looking for straight leg.

These straight leg pants came in a semi translucent garment bag with a product tag. The material is more like cloth slacks than denim. The material is well sewn, the seams even and firm. The hardware is firmly in place and tight with none about to fall off or easily bent. I am 5’9”, 160lbs with a 30 inch waist so according to the sellers sizing chart and the warning the seller provided that the waist runs small, I ordered a size 12 and though these pants fit at the waist nicely, at the hips, waist and groin, they are outright huge. There is enough material for an extra 6 inches of fabric at both hips each and still enough material at the groin that if I was male, these would not be uncomfortable. These pants are plenty long enough, coming to the bottom of my heels. These will be really long on shorter people. The largest issue is how bad these handle washing. The color faded noticeably in a standard cool water wash and medium temp dry. I can not be sure, but the material also feel thinner as well. Priced at $39.99 at the time of this review, these pants just fit to oddly and fade to quickly to be worth the price.

The material feels like a mix between linen and nylon. They are on the thinner side and will be great for hotter days. They also feel as if they will dry fast if you get them wet. Waist is on the smaller side for a straight leg. I'm afraid if I had ordered a size larger, they would be huge in the legs. I am 5'9 and wish they were just a hair longer. Color is a pretty grey so they could be paired with any color.

These straight leg, business / casual pants are quite comfortable. They are made of a super soft knit material that is a little fuzzy too. I got the X-Large Petite size and they fit well around my waist, but were a little shorter than I prefer on leg length. I am 5' 4", and often pants are too long. Since they had the petite sizes I went with that, but I guess I am borderline between sizes for the sizing of these pants. According to the chart and X-Large in regular would have 42.1" legs and I know those would be too long. Sort of a pickle on that one, lol. They are well made with solid stitching. The pleat down the front gives them a more stylish look for wearing away from home as well as lounging at home. They have a drawstring for waist adjustment, if needed. There are no pockets, though. With the thickness of the material, I thought they would be very warm, but the knit material must breath well as I wore them for 15 minutes or more while doing a couple things in the house and they were just as warm as the thin pants I had on before trying these on. They arrived in a zip bag and folded with them was a piece of tissue paper. Not sure why, but the tissue paper left tiny (pin-head sized) pieces of white here and there on the pants. The paper looked fine with no tears, but somehow it shed onto the pants, lol. Just mentioning as they were very visible on the black pair of pants I got. Over all, I'm recommending these knit pants. They are of a nice quality knit material and well made. Only caution I will say is study the size chart and hopefully the sizes will work better for the next person!

These strategy jeans are basically jeggings with pockets. Since my main objection to jeggings has been the lack of pockets, I am happy with this product. They're comfortable pants that I can wear around the house or go out in. Although the back pockets could be deeper, the front ones are quite large enough for my phone. These pants do run a bit long. I'm 5'4," and though the x-small fits me well in the waist and hips, the hem drags the ground even when I'm wearing shoes.

These stretchy pants are very comfortable. I love tho blue jeans look. The problem is the pair I received has a noticeable flaw in a prominent place which would make these pants a “factory second” by American manufacturing standards! The flaw is in the topstitching on the outside of the left leg, right at the knee. The machine appears to dave run out of thread and the stitching restarted. This created a one inch section of overlapping top stitching making that part thicker and darker than the rest. The thread ends of the new stitching are even left poking out unsecured. (see photos). This obvious flaw instantly made me disappointed and moved these pants from something I would wear out to dinner to just a pair of pants I will wear around the house. As far as sizing goes, I got a large and I probably should have gotten a medium for a tighter fit. I am 5’6”, 160 lbs with a “fit” build and I find the top of the pants hits me over an inch above my waist—not at or below the waist as pictured on te model. The leg length skims the top of my bare foot, so I would say they run a bit large.
These stylish, cute belts came in a 4 pack. I got the white, black, brown, and cream. I'm 5'3 and 155lbs, and they fit just right. They are simple to take on and off. I recommend them!

These sweatpants are extremely comfortable and they fit my 5'4" and 125lb frame perfectly (I ordered an XS). The material is soft and good quality and it doesn't seem to crease easily. They are also very well manufactured. The only thing I don't like is that you can see the outline of the pockets so I may actually cut the pockets out because I don't really need them.

These sweatpants are great quality, they are thick and really soft. I am 5’9 and 150ish lbs and I got the medium and they fit perfect! I was worried they would be too short but I am very pleased with the length; however, if you’re taller then 6’0 I would be cautionary. I haven’t washed them yet, but I don’t plan to dry them in the dryer to prevent pealing and shrinking.

These sweatpants are huge! I ordered a women's medium. I'm only 5 ft and weigh 130 lbs. I know I'm short, but I wear a medium, sometimes a large depending on the clothing. These pants are gigantic. They come all the way up to my chest and are super super baggie on me. I gave them to my 6 ft tall husband and he can actually wear them around the house because he's pretty skinny. The tag says M, so I'm not sure why these are so big unless I was sent a plus size medium? I'm not sure.

These sweatpants are lined with a fleece material that is so soft and comfy. I would say the fit runs small, I ordered my size according to the size chart (XS, and I am 5’3” 115 lbs) and they fit but are a little tight in the waistband than I would’ve liked! The length is also a bit short on me but I do have longer legs. I’d recommend getting 1 size up than you think and you can always pull the drawstring tighter if needed!! I wanted to exchange for a size S but the shipping took weeks and I just didn’t want to deal with it. The seller offered me a 30% refund since the fit was off which was very nice!! I have washed them once on warm since receiving and hung them to dry and I don’t think they’ve shrunk at all!

These sweatpants are so comfy! They are soft and stretchy and made of regular sweats material with the fuzz inside. They aren't too thick or too thin. I think they will fit baggy as described in your normal size. I ordered a size up for extra room and length. I'm 5'9, 170lbs, size 12 or large, but I ordered an extra large. They are actually long enough for me, which is rare. They fit very roomy, a large probably would've been fine, but maybe I would've lost some length. It's hard to find good basic sweats like these that aren't made of weird material or the fit is strange.

These sweatpants are very comfortable, and the wide fit allows for plenty of movement. The fabric is thin, which makes them nice and breathable, but also a bit see-through. I mostly wear them around the house or when visiting family, but not for much else. I ordered a size L for a looser fit, though I usually wear a size M—M probably would have fit me better. For reference, I’m 5’4” and weigh 159 lbs.

These sweatpants fit me perfectly. It's often difficult for me to find sweatpants that are just right. With a 25-inch waist and a height of 5’6”, finding the perfect length and waist can be a challenge. However, these sweatpants are just the right length for me, hitting slightly above the floor and allowing me to pair them with sneakers.

These sweats are exactly as described. The material is a slick feel on the outside that I am not familiar with but they are definitely fleeced lined on he inside giving that warm feeling. I wore them with an oversized sweatshirt and sneakers and even though I was in a baggy look; I felt super cute and comfortable. My inseam is a 33. For reference. I am in the process of losing prednisone weight but still deal with an arthritic inflammatory disease. I’m 5’8 and 188#;. Longer legs with a shorter torso, a perfect fit is large or size US 12. Weight is mostly in tummy area now; 13# left to go. I still go one size up for extra looseness in clothing but it’s almost too big now to do so. Shoe size is about a 7 wide when inflamed. 7 medium when normal. US shoe size 7-8 is about normal depending on shoe. FYI: online purchases I try to keep rating simple. If I was in a local store and could hold and view it; 5 star would buy and take it home, one star would put it back on shelf and pick something else.#OnlyJesusSaves.

These sweats are light weight material, but are very comfy! The inside is not super soft, but it’s not scratchy. I’m pleased with the fit/length! Bought a Medium because of the reviews. I like a little bit of a roomier look. 5’7-5’8, 140lbs

These sweats are super comfy. They're thick and warm and so soft. For fit, they do run bigger. I'm 5'9, 170lbs, size 10/12 or large, but I ordered an extra large for a roomy fit. They fit bigger than I expected, I would've had plenty of extra room in my normal size. I'm really happy about the length. It's so hard to find sweatpants that are long enough on me and these actually bunch at the bottoms. The waist is nice and high and the waistband is the type that doesn't dig in at all. I'm definitely ordering more but I will stick with my regular size next time.

These Tapata Women's Wide Leg Jeans are pretty high-waisted and extremely wide. My daughter is 5.7 and usually wears a size small in women's clothing. I added some photos to show how these pants look on someone with her sizes (34 - 28.5 - 38).

These Tapata Women's Wide Leg Jeans are pretty high-waisted and extremely wide. My daughter is 5.7 and usually wears a size small in women's clothing. I added some photos to show how these pants look on someone with her sizes (34 - 28.5 - 38).

These tartan plaid pants are really cute! The perfect pant for Christmas celebrations. The red color is vibrant, and the pattern is really beautiful. The big bow that ties in the front adds festive style! I found them to be plenty long enough for my long legs (I normally wear 32 inch inseam jeans). They did run a touch snug though in the waist, so if you are between sizes in that area you may want to size up. There was a lot of extra room in the hip area though. I like the cut with the gathered waistline and loose, wide leg. Very on trend currently. The fabric was different than I expected. It is heavier and a bit more stiff than other dress pants in my closet. It feels like a quality fabric that should last. I do wish that there were pockets. For that missing element, I took off one star. All told, I am quite pleased with these fun red plaid pants. Looking forward to wearing them at the family holiday celebration!

These those black high-waisted wide leg pants are stylish and comfortable. I'm 5'2" and it's usually tought to find pants that don't need hemming, but pants fit me well. They look great with sneakers or flats, but look too short with heels. The waist is great, sitting just right with its stretchy back, zipper, and clasp closure. I just wish they had added a second clasp or a button for that extra secure feel. The fabric is smooth with just the perfect thickness. Not too thin, not too heavy. These pants are really versatile, sliding from a casual sneaker look to something more classy with flats and a belt. I can glam them up with some fancy accessories, and they elevate the look of the pants.

These three colors coordinate and accessorize any outfit. Not too thick, not too thin. I am a 27 waist and bought the smallest size. I do feel like they could offer an even smaller size because I am on hole 5 out of 7…with a looser fit.

These Trendy Queen Womens Striped Pants are better than expected. It is very light fabric, rather cool than the cozy type of cotton but very comfortable and nice on the skin. I got Large and I still have the oversized look I wanted. I am 5'7" and 143 pounds.

These Trendy Queen Womens Striped Pants are better than expected. It is very light fabric, rather cool than the cozy type of cotton but very comfortable and nice on the skin. I got Large and I still have the oversized look I wanted. I am 5'7" and 143 pounds.

These Tronjori Womens High Waisted Pull on Baggy Fleece Sweatpants Fall Winter Athletic Jogger sweats are "mom jeans" 80's style fit in the waist for sure! I'm 5'4" and 160 lbs. They're too big for me but that's not a negative. I'd rather have too big than tight and uncomfortable and comfy these ARE. * To start with the beige color is beautiful. It's a soft, creamy looking, light beige. * The outter fabric is very soft. Inner fleece is soft and fuzzy. * These are cozy and warm pants. I can feel a definite difference in how warm I feel with them on. * Side pockets....yea! * Wide elastic waist band. Elastic is soft and zero stiffness to it. There's a tie also in the waist band. * Leg bottoms are elasticized also. * Good stretch in the fabric overall. * Runs big. But I'm a bit petite though I don't generally wear petite sizes. These sweats fit me a bit too large but they fit overall. No saggy bottom. Even though I need to pull them up high on my waist I have no complaint because that's an extra warmth layer on my low back and sides. I generally need a size short in jeans so too much length isn't a shocker to me. Definitely recommend.

These trousers are funky and fun! Definitely not as bold and funky as the listing photos show, which I’m thankful for! Whenever listings say lantern sleeves or pant legs they never are as pronounced as the photos. Trousers run true to size, I ordered a size small and they fit great! For reference I’m 5’7 approximately 135lbs, thick hips and thighs. Very casual and comfortable! I love that corduroy is coming back! Highly recommend!

These trousers are funky and fun! Definitely not as bold and funky as the listing photos show, which I’m thankful for! These trousers are soooo cute! I usually wear a size 12 or large in pants but the Amazon size chart recommended I get this in an XL and I’m so glad I did! It fits me perfectly, and the legs are just wide enough (a large probably would have fit but I don’t think it would have given me the relaxed fit I’m looking for). Im also 5’5 and the length of the trousers hits me perfectly a little past my ankles. The fabric is soft and flowy. It is however a little thin and see through but not extremely thin. I will get a lot of use out of these pants during all seasons of the year.

These trousers are very stretchy and comfortable. I’m 4’11”and they are not particularly cropped on me, but still love the look and have received many compliments. Only disappointment is that the wash instructions say hang dry, which then requires pressing.

These trousers were selected for a woman 5'8", 165 lbs., and the Large size fit is perfect. These slacks are lovely, dressy, the fabric substantial with a nice drape, the needle work perfect. This is a quality garment that should sell for a lot more than $30. Very flattering! The buttons are pretty, but only the waist button is functional. The buttons on the pocket flaps are for aesthetics only as are the flaps themselves, but there really are front pockets. The two back pockets are aesthetic only. The two cargo pockets are real. I like that the cargo pockets are placed lower on the leg and away from the hip, keeping the hips looking slim. The elastic waist in the back is well done and allows a good fit while allowing for roominess. This is a good thing because there are only two belt loops which are located on the front of the slacks so a belt is not really an option. This is the only thing that I find to complain about. Again, this is a quality garment suitable for dress or casual wear. I highly recommend you get them while you can at this price. I know I will be further investigating the AusLook brand for more quality bargains.

These turned out to be more of a pea green color so a bit different than expected. The fabric is the same as lightweight yoga pants, and looks a little like double knit from BITD. I usually wear medium and they fit ok but a little snug. The waist is 28" and the inseam is 29" so they are petite-length. I'm 5'6" and petite doesn't work for me. The pockets are too small to be functional, the front pockets are more cosmetic and the back pockets aren't big enough for a phone. So they're not as practical as I'd hoped. They do wash and dry without shrinking, pilling or fading so they're easy care. Going by the reviews, I expected more than dressy yoga pants. But the fabric, size, color and practicality wasn't what I'd hoped so I wouldn't order again.

These Ugerlov Women's Wide Leg Striped Pants are truly soft and ideal as pj pants! You can tell and feel the quality of 95% cotton! I love the blue stripes! The pattern is simple yet modern. You get the maritime feeling. The cut is very generous though! I am 5'7" and 143 pounds, My size by pants varies between Medium and Large because of my tights. I also was afraid that the waste might be too tight, which I really don't like by pajamas, so I ordered Large. I believe I could have gone with a Medium though! I still will keep the pants. After all I only wear them at home and for sleeping, so the fit doesn't matter too much.

These were a little longer then what I hoped I'm 5'6, they held up all night I was dropping blue sparkles all night. Thick thighs so that kept losing some pieces and strings tangled but held up and I wasn't cold. This was for a Taylor swift dance party.
These were a perfect buy for a Lainey Wilson concert. 120lb 5’5” they could be a little tighter but I purchased a small!

These were amazing. Comfy and fit great. I’m a 12-14 and with a hanging belly I got an XL- I’m 5’6 and the length was PERFECT. A little wrinkled I hit them with a low iron and it came out well enough. Seems like great quality but I’ve only worn them once. A large may have been fine but I was on a time crunch and wanted to make sure they fit and were not too tights on my lower Belly. 10/10 for me.

These were better than I expected! They fit perfect, not too tight but not too big. I feel like I could eat a lot and not feel uncomfortable in them. However I wish they were an inch longer. For reference, I’m 5’4 142lbs and got a size small! Fabric is super nice!

These were comfortable. They stretched just the right amount and were long enough on me. I am 5'9" and sometimes pant length is an issue. The waist was not tight but also not too loose. I mostly didn't like how they fit in the rear end but that is probably just my own personal preference and not necessarily a problem with the pants. I ultimately returned.

These were comfortable. They stretched just the right amount and were long enough on me. I am 5'9" and sometimes pant length is an issue. The waist was not tight but also not too loose. I mostly didn't like how they fit in the rear end but that is probably just my own personal preference and not necessarily a problem with the pants. I ultimately returned.

These were cute, but not quite as expected compared to other leggings/stretchy pants I’ve ordered. The material was pretty thin and cheap feeling/looking. I am 5’8”, 140lbs and ordered a M, which is usually on point. These were a little too big and the top of the waistband felt like it didn’t give. The length was actually really nice because I can never find pants long enough, but the waist and legs were a bit too baggy. I probably could size down to a S, but am not because of the material and waistband (a small might be too small at the top and not give). I also wasn’t expecting the inside to be white material on a mostly black pair. Returned without getting a new one.

these were delivered today and IM IN LOVE!!! Definitely gonna order another pair 😍 Ordered a Size 13X36 For size reference I’m 6’0 218 pounds. Currently wearing size 14 comfortably

These were different than I expected, in a great way. They are made with a heavier-weight, stretchy, knit material that hangs well. The wide waistband doesn't roll down and is elastic all the way across the back. I'm 5'4", size 12/14 and the XL fits perfect and very high-waisted on me. I ususally wear 29 inseam, these hit right above the floor. They have a non over the top wide leg cut that can be dressed up or down. I washed them in cold and tumble dried on low. Minimal fading and no shrinkage. I got the A brown color which looked much more grey/taupe in the product pics. It's actually a nice warm brown.

These were essentially what I was looking for, a lightweight, comfy, denim pull on but not quite a home run. FABRIC and STRETCH The fabric is NOT stretchy, only the waistband has stretch. Of course there will be color variation, but the pics show a more weathered, distressed look than the mine. SIZING and FIT: I tried both XL and 2X and there's not a whole lot of difference between the two as far as I can tell, but there's more room in the hip and thigh in the 2X. The fit isn't super flattering, especially from the back, but that could be because I have a relatively big, round, bum so it isn't as gathered back there as it is in the model pics. I think I'd probably need a 3X (which they don't have) to get that cute extra baggy look. OVERALL: For reference, I usually wear about a size 16 in pants. I'm plus sized (50-44-48) with a large bust and bum but no hips. I carry most of my weight in my belly. So while these will fit a plus sized body, they fit more like a regular relaxed jean than a baggy/slouchy jean. If I keep them, I will probably go with the smaller size (XL) because they're slightly more flattering as a relaxed jean, but if I could, I'd prefer to size up to get the slouchy, oversized look like the model.

These were exactly what I wanted! Cute and comfy with plenty of stretch. Not super high waisted, rested around my bellybutton. For reference, I’m 5’1”, 160lbs. I normally get mediums but they tend to be tight around my thighs so I sized up.

These were exactly what I was looking for. I dont love high rise jeans but these are nice. Very stretchy. Make sure you order a size DOWN. I'm about 5'5", 135 lbs and I got a size 6. Legnth and flare is perfect for boots.

These were exactly what I was looking for. I dont love high rise jeans but these are nice. Very stretchy. Make sure you order a size DOWN. I'm about 5'5", 135 lbs and I got a size 6. Legnth and flare is perfect for boots.
These were great for a holiday outfit or for a sports team. I am 5ft and with heels I can wear them. They do show lines so there’s that. I’m wearing an XL

These were great for my daughter for homecoming costume days. They were long enough, she’s 5’6” and have enough stretch to accommodate booty and thighs. She loves them and plans to continue keep them as part of her regular wardrobe.

These were incredibly soft and warm, maybe a little more snug than I’d like getting on/off, but perfectly comfortable while wearing. Unfortunately they were far too long for my 5’2” 160 lb frame. Going to have to send back.

These were just a bit wrinkled when they came from the packaging, but right away, I felt they were really high-quality fabric. They are thicker pants with sturdy stitching, and they ironed out very easily with a quick steam/poly setting on my iron. After that, they did not wrinkle even when I grabbed them and balled them up, so that's great news. They will travel well, and when I arrive at my meetings, I won't be a wrinkly mess. The main issue is they are VERY long. I am 5'7", and these have at least two extra inches that will need to be hemmed up. I would say though, the quality of these pants is so good that I am willing to hem them rather than return them. As far as the other sizing - I wear a 16 and they were perfect. They don't ride up in the back and they are nice and flat in the front. Once hemmed, these will be my go-to pants for meetings and travel.

These were just okay. I kept them because they were less than $30 so I figured why not. They are comfortable but they aren’t that cute. They are also pretty short. These were not stretchy at all. More like a boyfriend Jean BUT I loved them. I’m 5’4 about 130lbs and got a size 4. They fit me perfect. I did have to roll the bottoms up because I didn’t like how they looked. They did stretch out a little after I sat down but that’s okay.
These were on sale and had good reviews so I decided to give them a shot. They are pretty soft and fit nicely. I am 5’3” 128lbs.
These were perfect ! I am 5’7 185 I would not recommend anyone taller . Xl Very cute amid comfortable. .

These were perfect for my Halloween costume, so cute I would wear them out! I’m 5’1, 145 and they were a little long (I wore 3”platforms and still drug about an inch). They were a little big in the waist but no problem once I put on a belt. The embroidery detail was so pretty!

These were perfect for the disco event I went to this weekend. I was worried they would be too short as I’m 5’9” and pants often are but they were almost too long! Definitely need a big sneaker or boots. They aren’t perfectly opaque but definitely not nearly as transparent as some reviews say. I got XL just in case they ran small but they’re pretty true to size so large would have been best, especially bc my lower body isn’t curvy. True to color as well. Definitely recommend! Will wear these in everyday life as well!
These were perfect!!!! I ordered an XL, think I’m 195lbs! I want one in every color!!!

These were really bad. I’m 5’10” and a 27” waist. I typically wear a 4 but based off their size chart I went with a 6. They were way to big around the waist, the “high waist” was not high and they were SO short… didn’t reach my ankles short. Immediately took them off and will be returning today. They’re also really stretchy so regardless, I wouldn’t go off of the size chart sizing up.

These were recommended to my by a friend who is short and curvy (10S). I got the 6S and am very pleased. These wide leg pants are very comfortable, with an elastic waist and tie to keep them from being too loose. I am 5'8", so you can see the length in the photo. I have worn them a couple times and they are fairly wrinkle resistant. These are as comfy as sweatpants, but a lot better looking!

These wide leg yoga pants are incredibly comfortable with nice stretchy material and a good fit. I love the fit especially for yoga as I find they have a nice, loose, wide leg style yet are still fitted in the right areas, and I love that they move with my body when I am doing different poses. The addition of pockets is a nice touch, even though I might not put anything too bulky in them since they are form-fitting to the body, but they are nice and deep and still great for slipping your hands into. I ordered my usual size Medium, and they fit great. For reference, I'm 5'6", 145 lbs, with a 28" waist and 38" hips. The only small issue I noticed is that panty lines can be visible when wearing these pants, so you might want to opt for seamless underwear depending on how they fit you. Overall, these have become my go-to lounge and yoga pants. They're so easy to slip on and off, and they look flattering while still being incredibly comfortable.

These wide leg, high waisted jeans are very comfortable. They fit me well, except because of my shortness (5' 4") they are not really cropped on me. More like flood pants, but I am okay with that. I do not have to worry about the bottoms getting wet or my lower legs getting too cold, lol. They have three buttons that are quite stiff to unbutton when you get them but are fine after the first time. The zipper works well. There are four functional pockets, two in front and two in back. The pockets are a little smallish, but would hold a tissue or car keys. As you can see in one of my pictures, if you are apple shaped like I am, the white of the inside of the pocket (on the front) will show, despite the fit being not too tight. Not a problem for me as I most always like to wear shirts / blouses that are long enough to cover at least most of my bottom. Not sure how the pocket issue could have been prevented in the designing of them, but there probably is a way. These jeans seem to be mostly well made. The only thing I noticed really was that the buttons are sort of the cheap type that wiggle and rattle. Not sure what the durability would be of those. Aside from that, I can recommend these jeans and I am happy with them. The reason I only gave four stars was for the buttons and the white of the pocket showing. If anything comes up about those buttons on mine, I will update my review.

I’m usually a small-med, 5’6 130lbs for reference. The elastic waist is very stretchy and forgiving, thus allowing you to size up or down depending how you prefer your pants to fit. I highly recommend this seller and these pants. I will probably order more pairs in the other colors available.

They are very stretchy with lots of room for progressing pregnancy, I guess. I am 5'3" / 120 lbs pre-pregnancy and usually wear size small. They hit at the ankle on me and are a too little loose to be a true "skinny" jean. I like my skinny jeans to look more like leggings. You can see how loose they look in my webcam pics. For temporary pants to get you through the 6 months you need something to wear, they seem okaaay. On the pair I received, I noticed at least 2 holes (1 large, 1 small) in the back, on the stretchy part near the hip & above where it meets the jeans. This was straight out of the package; I have not washed them yet. So I guess I lost the quality lottery with my pair. I was desperate for pants though so I am planning on repairing them myself with a needle/thread. If the rips were in the front, I might be less lazy about returning them. It's been difficult for me to find maternity pants that are small enough, but somehow these aren't as loose as others. It's still pretty early in my pregnancy (not quite halfway yet) so I don't expect the belly to fit just yet, but they are fairly loose around my thighs/hips so I feel I need to constantly pull them up. Not the most comfortable, but better than no pants. I'm hoping I like them better later in my pregnancy when my belly can help to hold them up. If after washing they are still quite loose, I'll just take them in a bit along the leg seams so I don't feel so frumpy.

This 2 piece tracksuit is decent for the price. It runs very true to size - I ordered XL: I'm 5'10" and around 150lbs. It's actually a little bigger than I prefer: but I'd rather order a size up than have it be too small. The fabric has a lot of stretch to it and can accommodate varying bust/hip sizes. It does has some flaws though, which may be a deal breaker for some people. The sleeves are too short - and the pants are a little too long + slightly baggy around the ankles. Also, the collar circumference of the top is way too big around my neck: even when it's fully zipped. To camouflage this, I plan on wearing it with the "lapels" turned down. The fabric is also a little bit scratchy feeling and not very soft. The white zippers are pure snow white color, while the white stripes of the fabric are an off-white color. You can tell if you really look in person but it's barely noticeable. Overall, this isn't too bad for the value if you can overlook some potential flaws. I give this 3 out of 5 stars

The belt is made out of a silver glitter faux leather that is thick and durable and the glitter does not flake off. Each of the rhinestones is riveted into the pleather and is super secure, they aren't going to be falling off. It has heavy duty hardware encrusted with rhinestones, the belt is just heavy weighted and feels super expensive. The belt runs true to size, I have a 38 in waist and ordered the L that fits 39-44in and have plenty of room to adjust if I wear low rise pants or otherwise. I've got the silver belt that has the iridescent rhinestones through the middle, I love the little pop of rainbow that they give. Although the belt says it's western style I actually find that it works well with many styles of clothing and think that this belt is an absolutely beautiful accent to any outfit to make it super fancy.

This belt is super cute. It's very sparkly and stylish. The rhinestones on the buckle are a great touch! The belt is the perfect width to wear with jeans. It is thick and of great quality. My only complaint is with the sizing. I am a waist 28 so I ordered a size small which is supposed to fit waist 26-34. The medium is 32-40. This belt barely fits; I can only get it on the first hole and it feels tight. There is no way that this would fit someone with a 34 waist. The size chart is way off. I wish I had ordered a medium, but I didn't know that the chart was incorrect. I would recommend sizing up from whatever size you are on the size chart. I wish I had known that before ordering it. Overall, I do like this belt, but I will have limited use of it because of the tight fit.

I’m 132 lbs., pant size 6/8 and got 39.4”long for 32-34” waist size.

This cute dress caught my eye because of the pockets. Most of the time, women's pockets disappoint me because they're either tiny, or they're so stretchy that anything with a little weight ruins the look. Not this time.The pockets on this dress are huge! I tried to find something big to illustrate the size because my phone just disappears into the depths. The hairbrush in the photo is of standard size. That should give you some idea. Because the dress is made of denim, there's no stretching problem either. I'm 5' 4" and 115 pounds. I don't know why I decided to order a medium, but that's what I did. I can make it work, but I'd get a small if I ordered again. These dresses seem to run true to size, but the belt gives a little leeway for those in between sizes. Actually, I'll probably change or modify the belt. For some reason it was made super long. It's as if it was meant to be a tying belt, and the buckle was added as an afterthought.

This dark port color is a lot more versatile than you might think. I love this for a neutral alternative to black, brown or grey. It adds a pop of color without competing with the rest of your outfit. The design is a straightforward classic with a plain finish to the good quality leather. It's relatively sturdy but pliable and softens with wear. I anticipate it will last a good long while. I like the bonded finish on the edges too. the squarish buckle is like a tarnished brass for a lived in look. The tail end is squared with subtly rounded corners. This covers up the embossed Timberland logo when wearing. The medium size I ordered fits me well. I have a 31" waist and 41" hips and I can wear this on the second hole with midrise jeans, giving the belt a measurement of 34". There are five holes in this belt at one inch intervals measuring a span of 31" to 35" from tang to hole. The width is neither wide, nor skinny — 7/8" or 22mm, very workable and will fit through most belt carriers. I love it. Excellent quality with great workmanship. I wear this often!

This is a good quality multipack of belts. The material is soft and flexible, and the belts are thin enough to fit any pair of bottoms while not being too thin. I'm about 100lbs, so belts are often too long for me or don't have enough holes to fit my waist, but these belts are great! They are sized accurately and fit great! I love that the set comes with 3 neutral colors to coordinate with any outfit. My only concerns are whether the material will remain supple later or if they will dry out, crack, or rip. Time can only tell, but they are a great set for the price.

This is a great belt! I feel like I finally found my fashion groove with this belt. It is easy to close but will not come undone. And the design adds that little extra to outfits. I am so happy to have found this belt. I ordered the coffee & brown two-belt package because I was worried the colors would be off in the photos and I wasn't sure which brown would look best with the dress I planned to wear it with. First, let me say that the colors in the pictures are pretty accurate. "Coffee" is a dark brown and "brown" is more of a light brown/dark tan color. After reading the extremely varied reviews about the fit of the belts, I was very nervous to choose. I am 5'6" and weigh about 205 lbs., with most of my weight in my stomach. I ordered the XL (and worried they would be too small). The belt fit around my waist with very little stretch the first time I wore it, and I thought I might order the next size down for the next colors I wanted. But after wearing it 2-3 times, I realized that it didn't even have to stretch to reach around my waist. The belt had stretched permanently after just a couple times wearing it. (See picture -- I have not worn the lighter brown belt yet.) This is a stretchy belt, so it is to be expected that this will happen. I'm not really complaining; I just wanted to make buyers aware of this. I would buy a size down than what you expect will fit you. Not just because it will likely fit you anyway, but because the belts will stretch with wear. Hope this helps. Good luck!

This is a great fit with lots of stretch. I’m 5’4 and about 190 lbs. curvy around the mid section and wider hips. These are very comfortable. I am short and they fall just at my shoes, so if you’re taller, you may want to rethink these. I love these so much. Maybe my new favorite jeans!

This is a great pair of pants! Several positives... namely, I'm 5'10 & although these aren't the perfect length for me they are doable whereas the VAST majority of other pants are not. You cannot get away with rolling a too short wide leg to pull off a little cropped look, it's uhhh pretty bad. The color is great, vibrant while suitable for everyday dressy/casual wear. They are lightweight without feeling cheap, I've been able to wear them during the summer. The fit is pretty true to size, the only downside being the button hits riiight above my post babies pooch, accentuating it in a way I don't love lol but that's more of a me issue, I guess. If they had buttoned a little higher/lower, been slightly more flowy/billowy in that spot, or pleated in a way that didn't draw the attention there, that would've been nice though.

This is a great pair of statement pants at a great price! I immediately wore them (straight from the package without ironing) to church and received MULTIPLE compliments on them. They are fun to wear, feel nice and airy, and I found them remarkable easy to style. (I still need to iron them, which will only improve the look) SIZING: I followed the sizing chart (and you should too!). I'm an 8/10 US size (5' 5" and 150 lbs) and the chart indicated I should order a Large, so I did. I often order mediums, but the large fits perfectly.

This is a great pair of winter pants. I own several fleece-lined pants but this has to be the best pants of all. It is light yet warm, & high stretch material that moves with you. Most fleece-lined pants are warm but are so stiff that you feel like you can't move at all, but this stretches so well! I am 5'2" 120 lbs and got a small. It is a bit long but everything else fits well. The shipping was long tho. Took about a month but it was worth it!

This is a great product for the price and cotton & linen it's made with. This is a size large. I'm 5'8' and weigh about 180. I purchased four different pairs. I intend to buy all the colors.

This is a great relaxed “boyfriend” style overall. For all the reviews saying it’s saggy in the crotch or makes your butt look bad, I’m sorry, but that’s just the nature of overalls... especially a looser fit. And especially for those of us who grew up in the late 80s early 90s who are conditioned to think tight pants are the only pants worth wearing in public. I’m generally between a small and medium in both pants and tops. 5’6” with long legs but a short torso. I weigh 145, but am an athletic build so built about the way someone who weighs 130-135 who doesn’t lift heavy weights. I ordered a medium. The best thing you can do before returning these is take some selfies standing how you normally would for a picture and send to some of your GIRL friends. We’re usually our own worse critics, and if you’re not used to overalls or this particular fit, a second opinion helps. Don’t ask a man, they’d be happiest to see you with no pants ever. Anything that leaves your shape to the imagination to any degree annoys them 😂 They are soft and comfortable, a thinner stretchy denim. The light color is great for summer. I only gave 4 stars because out of the wash, I don’t like the way the top seam of the chest pocket sort of puckers and folds over. Easily fixable by wetting it down and ironing it(I use my straightener 😂), but annoying. Regardless, I will be buying these in the distressed style as well.

This is a great shirt and I plan to reorder in another color. But the sky blue didn’t look like the photo on the listing. Instead of nice even fading, it literally looked like they swiped down each side of the front with bleach. Not my vibe so returning. I will say, the rest of the shirt seemed great. Loved the frayed details and that it was long enough to wear with leggings. And huge bonus was that the sleeves were plenty long for us tall girls! Made of soft material that hangs really nicely, not stiff. Only other negative is that the models must be a lot shorter because it was nowhere near that long on me, I’m 5’8”. So if you are taller, dont expect it to look as long as it appears in the listing photos. Cute shirt though!

This is a great summer pant for work, very light and comfortable. The fabric is thin but feels high quality. The fabric steams very easily. I’m a size 8 and ordered the Large. I’m 5’1’’ and had to get them hemmed. I ordered the “dark green,” which isn’t a super accurate description of the color, but they’re very pretty. I’ll be ordering more in other colors!

This is a nice heavy weight woven stretch fabric belt that's 1.25" wide X 50.5" long total prox. including buckle (without stretching). I wear 42" waist pants and this belt has about 4" of extra length at the tightness I like. I really like this belt a lot, it can be worn for dress or casual and look great for either.

This is a nice pair of dress pants that looks, fits, and wears as advertised. The material is nice, quality made, a little stretchy, with no lining; making them a little see thru in a lighter color. The elastic waistline is comfortable wearing and there aren't any belt loops. I ordered a size 4 in the apricot color and feel it's a "snatched" fit for my 5'7 - 140lb frame.

This is a nice pair of dress pants that looks, fits, and wears as advertised. The material is nice, quality made, a little stretchy, with no lining; making them a little see thru in a lighter color. The elastic waistline is comfortable wearing and there aren't any belt loops. I ordered a size 4 in the apricot color and feel it's a "snatched" fit for my 5'7 - 140lb frame.

This is a nice pair of jeans I decided to try because I like the look. They are well made but they don’t work for me after all. They are just too long. I’m 5’4 and have longer legs for my height but they are still way too long. I’m still giving them four stars because they are nice jeans and I think they will work for many women. The material is comfortable and they have some stretch. I would recommend thinking twice if you’re not on the taller side though.

This is a nice shirt. Got it for a holiday party. I'm 6ft tall and it covered my bottom so I could pair it with leggings. Already washed and dried it and still looked good. Someone complimented me on it and I legit said "Thanks! It has pockets!"

This is a nice well made pair of stretchy jeans. The material is thick and sewed well. They are plenty long but not to long. I’m 5’8” for reference. The band is an elastic band that stretches and also the jeans are very stretchy themselves. They have pockets like normal jeans. The cloth feels really soft for the actual jeans as well. I’m not a huge fan of normal jeans. I like the stretchy ones so this will work nicely.

This is a nice, affordable pair of ladies Aeropostale jeans in a size 6. They are a perfect fit so they are true to size. The jeans are extremely well made, very durable. The jeans are high waisted with flared bottoms. I’m 5”9 and the length is just perfect. The lightweight jeans are very comfortable. The material has a stretch to it so they move with you rather than constrict you, I love how well the jeans fit. I’m impressed by the quality of the jeans, too.

This is a nice, soft fabric. Due to my curves, I typically wear size 10 or 12. These fit well. I just received them and haven’t washed them yet. Hoping they will shrink a little. I got a Medium (5’7” 155lbs) and could’ve easily gotten the small. Returning because it’s not the style in the picture.

This is a pair of ladies hi rise jeans with straight legs in a size 8. I ordered a size larger because I was afraid they might be too tight. I should’ve ordered my normal size 6 because it would have been a perfect fit so they are true to size. The size 8 is a little big around my waist but I will still wear them. I am 5 foot nine so the jeans are a little too short for me. I will roll the legs up and wear them as capris. They are a faded blue in color. They have a stretchy fit to them so they do bend and move with you. I recommend if you order these, the only thing that you be aware of is the land and make sure they will fit you correctly. Other than length, they fit great and it looks great.

This is a pair of wide-leg pants. The waist is elastic and provides a snug fit. I liked the ribbon around the waist. The fabric is very loose and flowy, but it has no sheerness to the look. I found the inseam to be a bit long for me. I am 5'2, so I need to wear these with shoes that offer a heel or platform to not walk on the bottom of these pants. I recommend this for someone a bit taller than me. Look-wise, I find these to be suitable for the office or a casual outing. I don't think these pants flatter me. I think these would look better on someone who wore a medium or small as opposed to someone who wears larger sizes like me.

This is a perfect way to wear sweats to the office! These feel just like yoga pants but still look professional. The front seam elevates these to make them passable. You really can't tell how comfy they are unless you touch them! I am 5'7" and 145lbs and I ordered the small, 34" inseam as I wanted to wear them with heels or platform oxfords. I followed the size chart based on my waist (28"). You can see in the photos, they are slightly tight at my waist, but fit perfectly everywhere else. They fit nice around my hips and booty too. A medium MAY have been too large in the waist. Overall, these work great for the office. No one will know how cozy you are! I love them but they also work well with my platform sneakers for a casual look.

This is a pretty nice belt, it feels decently sturdy and doesn't look too cheap. The size Large is spot on, I have 38" hips and still have a couple of holes free, and there are enough holes to where I can wear it higher up on my waist (where it's a bit smaller) if I want to. Pricing is fair.

This is a really cute pant but it’s too many sizes up. I’m 5ft 153 lbs normally a medium but the medium was too big. I then gave this to my size 16 mother and it fit her perfectly. Definitely size down 3 sizes to make this work

This is a really fun jacket shirt! I'm 5' 10" about 155 lbs. and am wearing a size L. It is, surprisingly, a bit big on me. The fabric is thick but not "bulky", it's the right balance for a shacket but too much for a shirt. The sleeves are long and roomy. There are usable pockets on both sides (at waist level not just the high front ones). This is a great accent piece, esp. during cool weather providing some warmth but not as much as a jacket.

This is a review of KUNMI Women’s wide leg pants. For reference, I ordered a size small. I am 5’3” and weigh 110-115 pounds. These pants are a perfect fit - I don’t even have to hem them! I ordered them in dark brown. The fabric is light and moves well. There are four small pleats in the front, which I like because it makes the waist fit without having the hip and thigh area look like it’s pulling and too tight. The legs are wide but not too much to be trendy. The back is elastic which makes them really comfortable. There are belt loops, but because I of the tailoring, I won’t need to rely on a belt to keep the waist in place. These pants are a great price for a classy, tailored look at work!
